name: Hegar Battleground HQ
subject: Nearly there!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Things are looking brighter at Team MJ HQ because we've had an amazing response to our recent update and are zeroing in on today's critical goal!

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909e9/7f51f7bc/4be030b3/4ef0a882/2649681305/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey Peter,

As we get further into November, the days are getting shorter and darker. It dipped below freezing this week -- that's a big deal in Texas! Things are looking brighter at Team MJ HQ though, because we've had an amazing response to our recent update and are zeroing in on today's critical goal!

**[But here's the thing, we still need supporters to chip in to ensure we hit it.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909e9/7f51f7bc/4be030b3/4ef0a886/2649681305/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUyMSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-novposteom?refcode=email_20191117.3nd__521__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

**_Look, we know you get a lot of emails like this._** But the reality is, this campaign could not run without the support of people like you. **And every goal we set revolves around the actual numbers we need to raise to ensure we can build the movement needed to beat Senator Cornyn.**

**To be blunt, November is _really tough_ for fundraising -- BUT November also means we're just around the corner from 2020.** So how much we raise now will dictate how much we're able to expand this campaign. **We did the math, and we just need a few more donors from your area to hit our goal. [Can you chip in _any amount_ to help us stay on track?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909e9/7f51f7bc/4be030b3/4ef0a886/2649681305/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUyMSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-novposteom?refcode=email_20191117.3nd__521__&amount=10&recurring=true")** Truly every dollar counts.

Because we don't take corporate PAC money, we depend on the generosity of folks like you -- and we don't take that lightly. We are putting every single dollar you give into beating Senator Cornyn in _less than a year,_ and we can't let the pressure up now.

**Will you pitch in to help us defeat Senator Cornyn and elect MJ Hegar to the Senate? Here's a link you can use so your donation counts toward our midnight goal right away:[http://www.mjfortexas.com/NovMidnight/Peter](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909e9/7f51f7bc/4be030b3/4ef0a886/2649681305/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUyMSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-novposteom?refcode=email_20191117.3nd__521__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Warmly,
Leah
[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909e9/7f51f7bc/4be030b3/4ef0a886/2649681305/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUyMSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-novposteom?refcode=email_20191117.3nd__521__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---

|
---

MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard.

MJ for Texas
P.O. Box 7156
Round Rock, TX 78683

Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax deductible.

| | Paid for by MJ for Texas
---

| | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909e9/7f51f7bc/4be030b3/4ef0a885/2649681305/VEsA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/unsubscribe").

name: Ed (personal)
subject: 99 before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| | | Hello - I wanted to reach out with a quick ask if you will donate to my campaign and help us reach this week's goal. We need another 99 donations to come in before midnight to keep me in the fight against President Trump's dangerous agenda. _**[Click here to donate and help me fight back.](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-november2019-weekly?refcode=EM-111719_3&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

name: Booker HQ
subject: This race is far from settled
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| **" Pete Buttigieg Jumps Out to Lead in Iowa Poll"**
_The New York Times_ Did you see the breaking news, team? Pete Buttigieg is now leading in Iowa by nine points. **This is the first time that any candidate outside of Biden, Warren, and Sanders has led in an early state poll.** **[The state of this race is in flux and there's a big opening for Cory to rise to the top. If you're ready to see Cory climb in the polls, chip in $5 now to help us grow our underdog campaign.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191117_BHQ_20191117-fr-BHQ-IApoll-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **Now is the time for our team to step up -- and here 's why:** Jimmy Carter was polling in low single digits at this point when he ran for president. Same with Bill Clinton. And at this time in the 2008 Democratic primary, Barack Obama was still well behind Hillary Clinton. Each of those candidates ended up winning because they shared a core message of unity that presented an optimistic vision for our country's future. They also ran campaigns that had an exceptional ability to organize on the ground and engage voters in their own communities. **[We need to continue doing both of these things if we're going to win this primary -- and it's clear from recent weeks that this race is far from settled. Donate now to help power our grassroots campaign to victory.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191117_BHQ_20191117-fr-BHQ-IApoll-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** This is our moment. Booker HQ [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191117_BHQ_20191117-fr-BHQ-IApoll-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d5a/5fca0d19/79fd2323/291c4d58/1685594244/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d5a/5fca0d19/79fd2323/291c4da7/1685594244/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d5a/5fca0d19/79fd2323/291c4da6/1685594244/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d5a/5fca0d19/79fd2323/291c4da5/1685594244/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d5a/5fca0d19/79fd2323/291c4da4/1685594244/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d5a/5fca0d19/79fd2323/291c4d58/1685594244/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bret=20Richards?=
subject: 👶 Defending the Unborn
body:
http://richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=0a0693f1ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_14_02_32&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-0a0693f1ab-25822489

http://richardsforcongress.com/contribution?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=0a0693f1ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_14_02_32&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-0a0693f1ab-25822489

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AKFcqll_hko&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=0a0693f1ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_14_02_32&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-0a0693f1ab-25822489
This week, I focused on the value of human life. As a father and committed pro-life advocate, I will defend the sanctity of life each and every day in Congress. Take a look at my proposals here. (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AKFcqll_hko&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=0a0693f1ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_14_02_32&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-0a0693f1ab-25822489)

https://www.facebook.com/BretRichards4Congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=0a0693f1ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_14_02_32&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-0a0693f1ab-25822489
https://twitter.com/Richards4Iowa?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=0a0693f1ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_14_02_32&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-0a0693f1ab-25822489
https://www.instagram.com/bretrichards4congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=0a0693f1ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_14_02_32&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-0a0693f1ab-25822489
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AKFcqll_hko&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=0a0693f1ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_14_02_32&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-0a0693f1ab-25822489
http://richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=0a0693f1ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_14_02_32&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-0a0693f1ab-25822489
Hello

When I was recently reminded that 60 million babies each year have been murdered in the womb since 1973, it made me sick. And that number will only continue to rise unless someone steps up to protect the unborn. Every life is a gift from God and deserves to be recognized as such. I am a proud pro-life advocate who will stand up to defend each life every day in Congress.

When elected, I intend to protect all life by:
* Putting an end to any discussion of infanticide legislation. Instead, our focus should be on decreasing the rate of neonatal deaths.
* Defunding Planned Parenthood and re-allocating these funds to pro-life crisis pregnancy centers.
* Voting to reduce the regulatory burden around adoption to cut costs for families and expanding foster care opportunities.
* Protecting conscientious objection for healthcare providers.

I will also work endlessly to combat the profiting off of those who can't protect themselves by voting to prevent aborted fetal tissue trafficking and pursue ethical alternatives to aborted fetal and embryonic stem cell research. When examining the root of the problem, it appears to me that our culture's value of life and family has been degraded. The government is not going to fix these societal issues; instead, we must send leaders who set an example that celebrates human life and our purpose on this earth.

This week, I also have some exciting news to announce:

Country singer Trey Taylor, who opened for President Donald Trump during his 2016 campaign, will be headlining a one-night-only evening of entertainment for our campaign. I'm grateful for the support and confidence Trey has placed in our movement. Read on to find out more about this special performance!
TICKETS AVAILABLE HERE (https://www.eventbrite.com/e/country-star-trey-taylor-concert-with-congressional-candidate-bret-richards-tickets-79743977383?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=0a0693f1ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_14_02_32&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-0a0693f1ab-25822489)
I can't fight for the unborn and all human life without your support. Please considering donating $5, $15 or even $25 (https://richardsforcongress.com/contribution/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=0a0693f1ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_14_02_32&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-0a0693f1ab-25822489) to our campaign, as well as help spread my message throughout your community. Your generous donation can be made here. (https://richardsforcongress.com/contribution/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=0a0693f1ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_14_02_32&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-0a0693f1ab-25822489)

Feel free to reach out to me at bret@richardsforcongress.com (mailto:bret@richardsforcongress.com) or (712)-579-4753 to tell me about your vision for Iowa or to lend a hand on our campaign. I look forward to hearing from you.

I invite you to read on to see what I've been up to this week and all of the things we will accomplish together that are yet to come!

Your neighbor,
MORE ON LIFE
UPCOMING EVENTS
Country star Trey Taylor is hosting an EXCLUSIVE evening of entertainment for our supporters in Sioux City on December 13. Get your tickets here (https://www.eventbrite.com/e/country-star-trey-taylor-concert-with-congressional-candidate-bret-richards-tickets-79743977383?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=0a0693f1ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_14_02_32&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-0a0693f1ab-25822489) TODAY!
https://www.eventbrite.com/e/country-star-trey-taylor-concert-with-congressional-candidate-bret-richards-tickets-79743977383?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=0a0693f1ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_14_02_32&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-0a0693f1ab-25822489
BUILDING OUR NETWORK
Learned so much from the O'Brien County GOP in Primghar about the need for more outsiders in Washington, willing to take on career politicians and the establishment. Also had fantastic hour-long discussion with a great group of Iowans at the Butler County GOP (https://www.facebook.com/Butler-County-Iowa-GOP-880918318692381/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=0a0693f1ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_14_02_32&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-0a0693f1ab-25822489) meeting in Allison. And I always appreciate being back in Spencer to visit the Clay County GOP and the Kossuth County Right to Life (https://www.facebook.com/kossuthcountyrighttolife/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=0a0693f1ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_14_02_32&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-0a0693f1ab-25822489) in Algona.

This week, I also started a new and worthwhile experience for me: knocking doors, pounding the pavement, and earning votes by talking to Iowans on their front door steps. This is the way candidates looking to earn the public trust should be getting their support.

RECENT COVERAGE

https://richardsforcongress.com/richards-visits-the-daily-grind-in-sioux-center/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=0a0693f1ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_14_02_32&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-0a0693f1ab-25822489

https://siouxcountyradio.com/the-daily-grind/2019/11/12/bret-richards?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=0a0693f1ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_14_02_32&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-0a0693f1ab-25822489
"That’s how you start making changes. It does start with electing people who go to Congress to be citizen legislators and come home when their time’s up."
UP NEXT

Looking forward to another busy week listening to local conservatives at the Floyd County GOP and Story County GOP meetings. I will continue meeting everyday Iowans wherever they are to keep control of Congress close to the people.

GET INVOLVED

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=O5xPeOhUV0U&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=0a0693f1ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_14_02_32&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-0a0693f1ab-25822489
BARN SIGNS ARE AVAILABLE NOW! EMAIL INFO@RICHARDSFORCONGRESS.COM (mailto:info@richardsforcongress.com) TO GET YOURS TODAY!

We can't let this election be determined by Washington or Des Moines insiders. Send your neighbor to Congress instead! Even if you're unable to donate (http://richardsforcongress.com/contribution?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=0a0693f1ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_14_02_32&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-0a0693f1ab-25822489) we still need your help.

Want to serve as a county co-chair? Know others who might want to join our team? Send an email to volunteers@RichardsForCongress.com (mailto:volunteers@RichardsForCongress.com) to lend a hand.

Be sure to like us on Facebook (http://facebook.com/BretRichards4Congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=0a0693f1ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_14_02_32&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-0a0693f1ab-25822489) and follow us on Twitter (http://twitter.com/Richards4Iowa?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=0a0693f1ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_14_02_32&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-0a0693f1ab-25822489) and Instagram (http://instagram.com/bretrichards4congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=0a0693f1ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_14_02_32&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-0a0693f1ab-25822489) to stay up to date!

============================================================

You have signed up from a referral by a friend or our website

Our mailing address is:
Richards For Congress
P.O. Box 33
Irwin, IA 51446-0293

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can ** update your preferences (https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=7d99180ded&e=3cee88c8ab)
or ** unsubscribe from this list (https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=7d99180ded&e=3cee88c8ab&c=0a0693f1ab)

TICKETS AVAILABLE HERE () I can't fight for the unborn and all human life without your support. Please considering donating $5, $15 or even $25 () to our campaign, as well as help spread my message throughout your community. Your generous donation can be made here. () Feel free to reach out to me at bret@richardsforcongress.com (mailto:bret@richardsforcongress.com) or (712)-579-4753 to tell me about your vision for Iowa or to lend a hand on our campaign. I look forward to hearing from you. I invite you to read on to see what I've been up to this week and all of the things we will accomplish together that are yet to come! Your neighbor, MORE ON LIFE UPCOMING EVENTS Country star Trey Taylor is hosting an EXCLUSIVE evening of entertainment for our supporters in Sioux City on December 13. Get your tickets here () TODAY! BUILDING OUR NETWORK Learned so much from the O'Brien County GOP in Primghar about the need for more outsiders in Washington, willing to take on career politicians and the establishment. Also had fantastic hour-long discussion with a great group of Iowans at the Butler County GOP () meeting in Allison. And I always appreciate being back in Spencer to visit the Clay County GOP and the Kossuth County Right to Life () in Algona. This week, I also started a new and worthwhile experience for me: knocking doors, pounding the pavement, and earning votes by talking to Iowans on their front door steps. This is the way candidates looking to earn the public trust should be getting their support. RECENT COVERAGE "That’s how you start making changes. It does start with electing people who go to Congress to be citizen legislators and come home when their time’s up." UP NEXT Looking forward to another busy week listening to local conservatives at the Floyd County GOP and Story County GOP meetings. I will continue meeting everyday Iowans wherever they are to keep control of Congress close to the people. GET INVOLVED BARN SIGNS ARE AVAILABLE NOW! EMAIL INFO@RICHARDSFORCONGRESS.COM (mailto:info@richardsforcongress.com) TO GET YOURS TODAY! We can't let this election be determined by Washington or Des Moines insiders. Send your neighbor to Congress instead! Even if you're unable to donate () we still need your help. Want to serve as a county co-chair? Know others who might want to join our team? Send an email to volunteers@RichardsForCongress.com (mailto:volunteers@RichardsForCongress.com) to lend a hand. Be sure to like us on Facebook () and follow us on Twitter () and Instagram () to stay up to date! ============================================================ Copyright © 2019 Richards For Congress, All rights reserved. You have signed up from a referral by a friend or our website Our mailing address is: Richards For Congress P.O. Box 33 Irwin, IA 51446-0293 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can update your preferences () or unsubscribe from this list () .

name: Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak
subject: We need leadership at home AND abroad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Peter,
**"We've got to keep in mind that the crisis in Syria is still ongoing... we had Iran, we had Turkey and we had Russia in Geneva deciding on the future of Syria and we were not at the table."**
That was what I told Neil Cavuto on Fox News in my [interview](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11978318/122682142/-2145522524?emci=04ae4b40-8909-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTFiYjAxYi0xNDBhLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NQU2VL3dXZ2aeylvWLKiNcYnhZRK0P9f8ycB6Af8lzE=#sp=show-clips), speaking on the need to have a foreign policy that brings together allies and foes alike through diplomacy to solve challenges, rather than a scattershot approach that ultimately hurts us.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11978319/122682148/-2145522524?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTFiYjAxYi0xNDBhLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NQU2VL3dXZ2aeylvWLKiNcYnhZRK0P9f8ycB6Af8lzE=&emci=04ae4b40-8909-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=a11bb01b-140a-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798)
**"When we absented ourselves from Syria from abandoning our Kurdish allies, we removed ourselves from the countries that will decide the final outcome in that country," **I told Cavuto, just like we hurt ourselves by abandoning the Iran nuclear accord: "We had fixed Iran by bringing together strange bedfellows like Russia and China by convening the world to remove nuclear capabilities, because they would have had two in sixty days, and then this President said we're going to break our word. Our President forgot that **militaries can't fix a problem - they can only stop them.** "
[**Contribute**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11978320/122682153/1036341175?refcode=em111819cavuto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTFiYjAxYi0xNDBhLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NQU2VL3dXZ2aeylvWLKiNcYnhZRK0P9f8ycB6Af8lzE=)
**I compared this miscalculation to Iraq: **"Democrats and Republicans alike who voted for that tragic misadventure didn't understand how it might end before they decided to use our military."** I know the awesome power of our military, but also its limitations. That's why at such a turbulent time in the world the unique national security background of mine is not just unique among all the candidates, but it is sorely needed by our next President and Commander-in-Chief. **
[**Contribute**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11978321/122682158/1036341175?refcode=em111819cavuto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTFiYjAxYi0xNDBhLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NQU2VL3dXZ2aeylvWLKiNcYnhZRK0P9f8ycB6Af8lzE=)
**Please contribute to help ensure we have President who understands the world and how to lead friends and allies to ensure our collective national security interests, because America is facing a very challenging decade, from China and cyber warfare to autocrats and climate change.**
Warmest regards, Joe
[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11978322/122682163/1036341175?refcode=em111019cspan&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTFiYjAxYi0xNDBhLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NQU2VL3dXZ2aeylvWLKiNcYnhZRK0P9f8ycB6Af8lzE=)
Come on board. We encourage you to [visit our website](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11978324/122682170/-209557350?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTFiYjAxYi0xNDBhLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NQU2VL3dXZ2aeylvWLKiNcYnhZRK0P9f8ycB6Af8lzE=&emci=04ae4b40-8909-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=a11bb01b-140a-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798)
and get involved in these challenging and wonderful times.
Paid for by Joe Sestak for President

Alexandria, VA 22302

name: Senator Erica Smith
subject: Grassroots Goes to the Senate!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica for US
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/UXhQAXfMr-X79WuEKU6CD63R_C37Rku_-44EOLboaGQ=/sF79IQQFOOuF0EhPLnS1NDCpvANejQLgMiaejq2oq78=)

Dear Supporter,
From Friday to Sunday, a Democratic woman challenging a Trump GOP Congresswoman raised $1,000,000 from more than 20,000 people. A race was transformed in a mere 48 hours.

[**The power of grassroots activism to upset the status quo and shift bases of power is unmatched. **](https://act.myngp.com/el/UXhQAXfMr-X79WuEKU6CD63R_C37Rku_-44EOLboaGQ=/sF79IQQFOOuF0EhPLnS1NDCpvANejQLgMiaejq2oq78=)

Everyone reading this has participated in a similar grassroots effort. We are all working to disrupt the ways in which our elected officials are chosen by working to shift the power back to the people. This is OUR government and we must reassert our sovereign authority.

Our campaign plans to disrupt the formal campaign process by working to engage voters in new and different ways. But, we need your support to [**maintain our front-runner status**](https://act.myngp.com/el/UXhQAXfMr-X79WuEKU6CD63R_C37Rku_-44EOLboaGQ=/sF79IQQFOOuF0EhPLnS1NDCpvANejQLgMiaejq2oq78=). Your gift of any size will assure that the people's agenda in North Carolina moves closer to the United States Senate.

It's been 30 years since Shirley Chisholm's historic campaign as the first woman to ever run for President. Let's join Shirley Chisholm in history by continuing to be "unbought and unbossed" and winning a North Carolina Senate Campaign!

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/UXhQAXfMr-X79WuEKU6CD63R_C37Rku_-44EOLboaGQ=/sF79IQQFOOuF0EhPLnS1NDCpvANejQLgMiaejq2oq78=)

body:

Friend,

Nancy Pelosi, Adam Schiff and Ted Lieu - these are the Democrats responsible for the bogus impeachment hearings which just began on Capitol Hill this week.

With your help, we can take down one of these radical California leftists and ensure they can no longer overturn the will of the American people.

**I'm running to defeat Ted Lieu in California's 33rd District.** [**Will you fight back against the bogus impeachment agenda and help me kick Ted out of Congress by chipping in $25 or more to my campaign today?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53510549:sfrjKTv1N:m:1:2185358397:553C7258549B12AF10E0069C8CC57040:r)

Ted Lieu spends more time attacking our President on Twitter than he does addressing the homelessness, drugs and crime that his failed policies have brought into our district.

Lieu, Pelosi and Schiff have one goal, and it has nothing to do with fixing California ... but is has EVERYTHING to do with destroying President Trump and our country's freedom, prosperity and security.

[**Will you join my team with a $25 contribution - or any other amount - and help me take down Nancy Pelosi's right-hand man, Ted Lieu?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53510549:sfrjKTv1N:m:1:2185358397:553C7258549B12AF10E0069C8CC57040:r)

Brandon Fricke

name: Chris Finello
subject: Peter, checking in quick.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finello for Congress |
body:
This month’s election results reinforced the fact that Bucks is trending blue. _The Washington Post_ wrote, “Among the most troubling results for the GOP last week included heavy losses in the collar counties surrounding Philadelphia, indicating an uphill climb for Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick (R-Pa.), who narrowly survived the 2018 Democratic wave...”

Peter, I’ll work my tail off to win this, but I need you with me.

The GOP will spend millions to try and keep PA-01 red, so I’m asking you to pitch in today to help us build the resources we need to power our grassroots efforts. If I can’t count on you now, I’m worried we won’t have what it takes. Will you step up now?

Appreciate you jumping in here. name: Team Eugene
subject: 📎 Your signature is needed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
Last week, Eugene released a report on the devastating effects climate change is already having on our communities in PA and offered recommendations for how we can combat it.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11986058/122745775/-1568569260?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzRkM2U4ZS0yYzBhLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y5ZYi-IzpaWObEVirXU1wcfk3W-0iL8S4uH1FSkyuFI=&emci=60156c49-0e0a-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=4c4d3e8e-2c0a-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=10203249) Team,

Last week, Eugene released a report on the devastating effects climate change is already having on our communities in PA and offered recommendations for how we can combat it. **In 2018 alone, climate change cost Pennsylvanians a staggering $261 million.**

**Team, the longer we fail to act, the more climate change will continue to impact our public health and safety and disrupt the economy -- all while taxpayers foot the bill. Something has to give.**

[**Will you sign Eugene’s petition calling on our local, state, and federal leaders to take immediate action against climate change? We should be treating this crisis with urgency, and that’s exactly what Eugene intends to do in Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11986059/122745776/-1568569260?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzRkM2U4ZS0yYzBhLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y5ZYi-IzpaWObEVirXU1wcfk3W-0iL8S4uH1FSkyuFI=&emci=60156c49-0e0a-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=4c4d3e8e-2c0a-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=10203249) | [Add your name »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11986060/122745777/-1568569260?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzRkM2U4ZS0yYzBhLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y5ZYi-IzpaWObEVirXU1wcfk3W-0iL8S4uH1FSkyuFI=&emci=60156c49-0e0a-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=4c4d3e8e-2c0a-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=10203249)

On Friday, the League of Conservation Voters (LCV) -- an environmental advocacy group dedicated to fighting climate change -- threw their support behind Eugene in his bid for Congress. Eugene’s opponent Scott Perry, on the other hand, is one of the most anti-environment members of Congress and has an appalling 2 percent lifetime score from LCV. _2 percent!_

[**Join Eugene in the fight to save our planet by signing his petition today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11986061/122745778/-1568569260?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzRkM2U4ZS0yYzBhLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y5ZYi-IzpaWObEVirXU1wcfk3W-0iL8S4uH1FSkyuFI=&emci=60156c49-0e0a-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=4c4d3e8e-2c0a-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=10203249) [Sign the petition »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11986062/122745779/-1568569260?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzRkM2U4ZS0yYzBhLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y5ZYi-IzpaWObEVirXU1wcfk3W-0iL8S4uH1FSkyuFI=&emci=60156c49-0e0a-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=4c4d3e8e-2c0a-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=10203249)

clean_body: Last week, Eugene released a report on the devastating effects climate change is already having on our communities in PA and offered recommendations for how we can combat it. Team, Last week, Eugene released a report on the devastating effects climate change is already having on our communities in PA and offered recommendations for how we can combat it. In 2018 alone, climate change cost Pennsylvanians a staggering $261 million. Team, the longer we fail to act, the more climate change will continue to impact our public health and safety and disrupt the economy -- all while taxpayers foot the bill. Something has to give. | On Friday, the League of Conservation Voters (LCV) -- an environmental advocacy group dedicated to fighting climate change -- threw their support behind Eugene in his bid for Congress. Eugene’s opponent Scott Perry, on the other hand, is one of the most anti-environment members of Congress and has an appalling 2 percent lifetime score from LCV. 2 percent! Thank you for making your voice heard and taking a stand on this important issue. \--Team Eugene = Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates: Eugene DePasquale is running to represent Pennsylvania's 10th Congressional District. name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Mitch McConnell's money machine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Team,
From day one of this race, I've been honest about what we're up against: Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell are mobilizing every resource at their disposal to hang on to this Senate seat.
They're scared, and it's because we came out swinging. In just two months, we've built a grassroots operation that has proven to be highly competitive with the fundraising machine Mitch McConnell's been building for decades.
**Our campaign represents a major threat to McConnell's grip on power, and he isn't going to let go without a fight.**
But here's the honest truth: Cory Gardner has had a big month.
Trump headlined high-dollar fundraisers for Gardner, and he mobilized the Trump campaign's online base to chip in $100,000 to Gardner's campaign.
We've been here before, and we've proven that we can close the fundraising gap fast. But with McConnell and Trump taking an increased interest in this race, we can't afford to fall farther behind.
[**We 're setting a goal to raise $10,000 in the next 48 hours to help counter Trump's fundraising assist. Can you make a donation right now?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc33d/2a380d31/3d344dbb/f0e949/1546637037/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0aGlja2VubG9vcGVyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxOTExMThfTVdINEhpY2sxXzZtbyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4hickenlooper?refcode=e20191118_MWH4Hick1_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")

name: Bill Olson
subject: A family in service to the nation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hRHWogfDgV6OuRU&b=I.yov8Udv0Z3i1eGG4yEug

Hi Peter,

As a decorated U.S. Army vet who saw combat in the Middle East, Veterans Day means something to me.

Along the way, I was recognized for my service: four Army Achievement Medals, the Army Commendation Medal, and two Meritorious Service Medals.

I also received an additional Army Commendation Medal for my meritorious service in liberating Kuwait during Operation Desert Shield and Operation Desert Storm, and in 2008 I was awarded the Bronze Star for exceptionally meritorious service during the global war on terror in Afghanistan.

So you can imagine, being an Army lifer, that serving my country- protecting my country and our freedoms - is a VERY big deal to me!

That said, what I am MOST proud of, is that my passion for serving my country was passed on to my three sons.

Liberal Democrat Darren Soto did not serve in the military. Instead, he votes with AOC and her anti-American "Squad" over 90% of the time!

I think those who have laid the most on the line for our country and its citizens- whose who have taken an Oath to defend the Constitution- are the ones best fit to defend our Constitution in Congress.

I know this: that if there were more veterans in Congress, we would not be subjected to "Shifty" Adam Schiff's impeachment sham right now.

Maybe- just maybe- a Congress full of vets would be getting something done, instead of draining $2 billion out of the Social Security Trust Fund for a purely partisan sham of an impeachment hearing!

The Democrats have lost their minds- and Darren Soto seems to always be the first one off the cliff!

My sons and I are red-blooded Americans, who believe in America and in the Constitution!

I need to replace radical Democrat Darren Soto- and get one more common-sense vet into Congress!

I'm going to defeat Darren Soto

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hRHWogfDgV6OuRU&b=I.yov8Udv0Z3i1eGG4yEug
, a liberal extremist who thinks that taking money out of Social Security for impeachment hearings is ok.

I need your help today - to replace Darren Soto, stop the radicals in Congress, and stop the kook left from impeaching our President! Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hRHWogfDgV6OuRU&b=I.yov8Udv0Z3i1eGG4yEug

I need to raise

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hRHWogfDgV6OuRU&b=I.yov8Udv0Z3i1eGG4yEug
$8,000 more this month, to let the people of Central Florida know about Soto's liberal record. It's crazy and it's out of step with our community!

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hRHWogfDgV6OuRU&b=I.yov8Udv0Z3i1eGG4yEug
of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple?

The Democrats are going to lose next year- but only if we stand up and fight! It's up to us to save our country!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hRHWogfDgV6OuRU&b=I.yov8Udv0Z3i1eGG4yEug

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hRHWogfDgV6OuRU&b=I.yov8Udv0Z3i1eGG4yEug

P.S. This is congressional seat we can win in the swing state of Florida. I must defeat this radical socialist Democrat. Please contribute now before the end of the month whatever you can afford.

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hRHWogfDgV6OuRU&b=I.yov8Udv0Z3i1eGG4yEug
No amount is too small. God bless you and thank you - Bill.

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

Bill Olson is a retired member of the United States Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

5 Halifax Ct
Marlton NJ 08053
USA

body:

| Friend: [In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make your first donation to my campaign, but first let me tell you why.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba9da/134673f2/997ba1f/6997d6ce/3244324696/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_111819_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

The pollsters agree (for once): [There is an incredibly high number of undecided voters in this race.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba9da/134673f2/997ba1f/6997d6ce/3244324696/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_111819_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

Celebrity politicians who've been in the media spotlight for months, or even years, continue to miss the mark.

[But the more undecided voters learn about our campaign, the more they like it.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba9da/134673f2/997ba1f/6997d6ce/3244324696/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_111819_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

We're knocking doors, opening new offices, and hiring field staff, but we need to keep building at a fast pace if we're going to fuel this campaign to victory!

[That's where you come in. The average online donation to my campaign is $29, but any amount you donate today will help fuel this fight. Can I count on you to make your first donation today? >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba9da/134673f2/997ba1f/6997d6ce/3244324696/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_111819_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[We will win this election the same way we always have: by presenting a compelling and unifying vision for our country.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba9da/134673f2/997ba1f/6997d6ce/3244324696/VEsHBQ/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_111819_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: Sign the petition: Disclose the dark money for climate deniers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2cbb8/6cd27893/52e8b10c/15879ce8/3860633021/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | | [**Sign the petition: tell corporate America to disclose its dark-money contributions to climate deniers.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2cbb8/6cd27893/52e8b10c/15879ce9/3860633021/VEsE/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://petitions.signforgood.com/october-ccdm-ja/?code=merkley&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-jeff-merkley-pet-ty%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2019-10-october-ccdm-ja-email%26recurring%3D1%26amount%3D%7B%7Bask%7D%7D%26amounts%3D%7B%7Babamt_one%7D%7D%2C%7B%7Babamt_two%7D%7D%2C%7B%7Babamt_three%7D%7D%2C%7B%7Babamt_four%7D%7D%2C%7B%7Babamt_five%7D%7D")
---
**The planet is hurtling toward climate catastrophe. And two of the worst opponents of climate action, the U.S. Chamber of Commerce and the National Association of Manufacturers, are making things worse.**
They are spending millions upon millions of dollars to elect climate-denying politicians who support their toxic agenda.
Problem is we don't quite know who's behind all of it -- because it's dark money. These business associations are the front groups for corporations providing millions in funding.
It's time to change that. It's time for the public to demand accountability. It's time to reveal which corporations are funding climate deniers.
[**Sign the petition: tell corporate America to disclose its dark-money contributions to climate deniers.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2cbb8/6cd27893/52e8b10c/15879ce6/3860633021/VEsF/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/october-ccdm-ja/?code=merkley&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-jeff-merkley-pet-ty%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2019-10-october-ccdm-ja-email%26recurring%3D1%26amount%3D%7B%7Bask%7D%7D%26amounts%3D%7B%7Babamt_one%7D%7D%2C%7B%7Babamt_two%7D%7D%2C%7B%7Babamt_three%7D%7D%2C%7B%7Babamt_four%7D%7D%2C%7B%7Babamt_five%7D%7D")
America deserves to know.
**_Jeff_**

name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: never stop
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
I will never stop fighting for those who fought for us.
| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=37A42A1A403)
---
| | |
---
| | **Friends-

** Last Monday we celebrated Veterans Day and honored men and women who bravely served. But to me, every day is Veterans Day. It’s not just something I say, it’s something I have acted on as a member of the New York State assembly.

When Governor Cuomo attempted to strip funding from the state budget for peer to peer counseling and mental health services for struggling veterans, I fought back.

When New York Democrats passed a law to give illegal immigrants free college tuition and then turned around and voted against giving that same benefit to the children of military men and women, I spoke out.

---
| | |
---
| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=37A42A1A404)
---
| | | Assemblywoman Nicole Malliotakis on Fox News Tucker Carlson Tonight: Gold Star Families Before Illegal Immigrants

[WATCH NOW](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=37A42A1A404)

---
| | |
---
| | We won both battles and I was honored when the American Legions of both Brooklyn and Staten Island recognized my efforts in June.

---
| | |
---
| | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=37A42A1A403)
---
| | |
---
| | I will never stop fighting for those who fought for us.

Sincerely,
Nicole

P.S. Check out my Op-Ed about [Delivering for Veterans in 2019](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=37A42A1A405) which originally appeared in the Brooklyn Reporter.

| | **If Mitch McConnell loses his seat -- Democrats are all but GUARANTEED to flip the entire Senate.**_**[_Rush $5 to elect Ben Ray, DEFEAT McConnell, and WIN the Senate! >>_](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191118_em_fr_b1_mdv_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")**_

Our fight for the Senate boils down to one simple fact:

If Democrats unseat Mitch McConnell -- we will almost CERTAINLY take the entire Senate.

And McConnell is the most vulnerable he's been in more than 30 years.

Even Fox News admits his favorability is the worst in the entire Senate!

**But if we lose Ben Ray 's race -- we will completely sabotage this historic chance to defeat McConnell's Senate and pull off this upset.**

We can't let his critical ads come down even for a second.

Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?

We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b42b/18e32a7f/502a42ed/7b22fa81/2241097210/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement? ""** We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, "" If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe "", and we'll make sure to process your request. People for Ben PO Box 25371 Albuquerque, NM 87125 | | Paid for and authorized by People for Ben.

name: J.D. Scholten
subject: Peter, I want to share some photos with you:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Peter --

I wanted to give you a campaign update from the road. We’ve been having a great time visiting folks living in towns of 1,000 people or less to remind them that their voice matters. By the end of today, we’ll have hosted town halls in 23 counties (!!!) in the 4th district.

**[Take a look at the photos below, and if you can, please chip in $5 or more to help us defeat Steve King by building a grassroots campaign all across Iowa's 4th district.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11992047/122802659/535580310?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWFjODY0Yi00NDBhLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VYePEzYMKXO3REhxyrCk8fNsXV_8nF-gTxEi3drWnEM=)**
[DONATE TODAY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11992048/122802660/535580310?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWFjODY0Yi00NDBhLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VYePEzYMKXO3REhxyrCk8fNsXV_8nF-gTxEi3drWnEM=)
I started the month at Iowa’s legendary presidential event -- the Liberty and Justice Dinner. It was great to hear how the presidential candidates are going to work for the people of Iowa. A personal highlight was even getting a crowd to chant “America needs farmers, farmers need antitrust.” [**Take a listen.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11992049/122802661/-670696925?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWFjODY0Yi00NDBhLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VYePEzYMKXO3REhxyrCk8fNsXV_8nF-gTxEi3drWnEM=&emci=d886468a-0c0a-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=f1ac864b-440a-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11992050/122802662/535580310?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWFjODY0Yi00NDBhLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VYePEzYMKXO3REhxyrCk8fNsXV_8nF-gTxEi3drWnEM=)
We travelled to Wellsburg (pop. 693), where I heard from folks about the need for affordable child care and quality education. I love seeing families and kids out on the road -- everyone has a stake in this fight, especially our future generations.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11992051/122802663/535580310?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWFjODY0Yi00NDBhLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VYePEzYMKXO3REhxyrCk8fNsXV_8nF-gTxEi3drWnEM=)
In Ellsworth (pop. 506), we talked about the devastating effects of special interests in politics and how we need to make sure our rural communities have access to hospitals, broadband, schools, grocery stores, and more.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11992052/122802664/535580310?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWFjODY0Yi00NDBhLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VYePEzYMKXO3REhxyrCk8fNsXV_8nF-gTxEi3drWnEM=)
Snowy weather did not stop people from turning out in Battle Creek (pop. 690), where people opened up about the skyrocketing costs of life-saving prescriptions and procedures. It’s heartbreaking that so many people have to make choices about their health based on their bank account. That’s why I travel to these towns.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11992053/122802665/535580310?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWFjODY0Yi00NDBhLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VYePEzYMKXO3REhxyrCk8fNsXV_8nF-gTxEi3drWnEM=)
It was fitting that I was wearing one of my favorite RayGun shirts, America Needs Teachers, when I went to Rolfe (pop. 549). We had teachers and teachers’ aides in the audience -- they are vital to our community, and we have to make sure they have the resources and support they need to succeed so that our children thrive.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11992054/122802666/535580310?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWFjODY0Yi00NDBhLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VYePEzYMKXO3REhxyrCk8fNsXV_8nF-gTxEi3drWnEM=)
I love visiting these communities -- but I need your help to make sure we can stay on the road.

**[Pitch in $5 or more today so we can visit more communities across Iowa’s 4th district.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11992055/122802667/535580310?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWFjODY0Yi00NDBhLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VYePEzYMKXO3REhxyrCk8fNsXV_8nF-gTxEi3drWnEM=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11992056/122802668/535580310?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWFjODY0Yi00NDBhLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VYePEzYMKXO3REhxyrCk8fNsXV_8nF-gTxEi3drWnEM=)
Thanks for your support. Hope to see you on the road soon.

Standing Tall for All,

J.D. Scholten

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11992057/122802669/535580310?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWFjODY0Yi00NDBhLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VYePEzYMKXO3REhxyrCk8fNsXV_8nF-gTxEi3drWnEM=)

This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Have questions, concerns, or ideas? Simply reply to this email — we love hearing from supporters! You can also connect with the campaign on social media: Like us on [Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11992058/122802670/-579313244?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWFjODY0Yi00NDBhLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VYePEzYMKXO3REhxyrCk8fNsXV_8nF-gTxEi3drWnEM=&emci=d886468a-0c0a-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=f1ac864b-440a-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013) or follow the campaign on [Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11992059/122802671/-1912497674?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWFjODY0Yi00NDBhLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VYePEzYMKXO3REhxyrCk8fNsXV_8nF-gTxEi3drWnEM=&emci=d886468a-0c0a-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=f1ac864b-440a-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013). Email is one of the most important ways we stay in touch with supporters like you, so we'd hate to see you go; but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/d886468a-0c0a-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68/f1ac864b-440a-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWFjODY0Yi00NDBhLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VYePEzYMKXO3REhxyrCk8fNsXV_8nF-gTxEi3drWnEM=&id=109918160&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) from Scholten4Iowa emails.

We're not going to sugar coat this -- we know we're not the frontrunner in this primary race.

**But we deeply believe defeating Donald Trump and electing a proud Democrat is vital to America 's future.**

And John Delaney is America's best choice. He has a policy platform that is centered on real solutions to our nation's challenges.

As a successful businessman, he knows exactly how to institute a universal health care system without wreaking havoc on our economy or forcing hospitals to shut down.

His plans to protect our environment, end gun violence, and restore our Democracy are practical, innovative, and most importantly -- able to pass a bipartisan Congress.

We hope you agree because if we're going to make sure this message stays front-and-center, we really need your help today.

And the truth is, if everyone reading this chipped in just a dollar or two, we'd hit our goal before lunch!

**Let 's get this done. Chip in any amount right away:**

**[https://go.johndelaney.com/Donate](https://go.johndelaney.?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jkd_fr_eoq42019?refcode=em_fr_2019.11.18_e1_jkd_mid-month_nd&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=1,5,35,50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Silver Spring&state=&zip=20906&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=9+-+httpsgojohndelaneycomDonate&utm_campaign=em_fr_2019.11.18_e1_jkd_mid-month_nd&source=em_fr_2019.11.18_e1_jkd_mid-month_nd")**

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: New poll spells trouble for Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, A recent _Reuters_ poll conducted last week highlighted a growing problem for Trump's re-election campaign: he is very unpopular with independents. 62% of independents surveyed disapproved of him, higher than the national opinion average, and 64% of independents also believe the country is currently on the wrong track. Independent voters may be the key to unseating Donald Trump and retaking the White House, but with the news cycle and public opinion changing so quickly, we need to keep our data from all engaged voters as up-to-date as possible. Can you update your response now? **Do you approve of Donald Trump?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc2b/6e9863e8/1665f7b4/1db09232/1304997524/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/lxghbCbX") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc2b/6e9863e8/1665f7b4/1db09232/1304997524/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/lxghbCbX") Thank you so much for your participation. -WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc2b/6e9863e8/1665f7b4/1db09231/1304997524/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191118a.ND-b&refcode2=kvHtjD323YJMSJflezXI")

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: It’s Democracy — Not Trump — That’s on Trial on Capitol Hill
body:
"Public impeachment hearings have begun in Washington, but nothing has changed. The Ukraine ‘rebound’ scandal simply follows..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=78bb0d41ec&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **It’s Democracy — Not Trump — That’s on Trial on Capitol Hill**

“Public impeachment hearings have begun in Washington, but nothing has changed. The Ukraine ‘rebound’ scandal simply follows from the Russia collusion probe as the latest front in a smoothly operating, taxpayer-funded, propaganda war of political intimidation: an attempt not only to undermine President Trump, but also to demoralize and break the will of those who voted for him,” Augustus Howard writes in the _New York Post_.

“Democrats, trying to ‘move on’ from the disastrous testimony of Robert Mueller, offer us a new cadre of government-insider witnesses, most of whose evidence would be laughed out of any courtroom in America.”

House Democrats’ real goal is to tell President Trump’s supporters that “those who dared challenge the permanent, elite government class — to know they can never win.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=51b3c1ccae&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Democratic Rep. Adam Schiff isn’t a constitutional scholar, but he plays one on Impeachment TV. His latest gambit is an attempt to redefine ‘bribery’ in the Constitution to include President Trump’s behavior toward Ukraine.” Of course, “he’s wrong about the law and constitutional history,” [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6359ec6f3d&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| The Trump Administration took two huge steps toward improving American healthcare on Friday. “Just about every person in the U.S. has had an experience of confusion, frustration, anger, and sometimes severe financial distress due to the bureaucracy and sheer obscurity of healthcare pricing . . . With these two rules, the Trump administration is trying to provide the price signals and other information necessary for patients to be informed,” Quin Hillyer reports in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=da28c6d79e&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Ivanka Trump and USAID Administrator Mark Green will announce on Monday an additional $50 million for the W-GDP Incentive Fund, which aims to help 50 million women in developing countries by 2025,” Evie Fordham reports for [Fox Business](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9e712eb37f&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c6c68b7a91&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4e11cce30c&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=7cad935eaa)
---

---

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Pacing behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
I know whenever someone digs deep and chips in $5, $10, or whatever they can afford, it's because they're raising their hand to say "I'm ready to own a piece of the movement that's going to bring... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528ab4/45c30650/11a46428f/66f4ee6a/761650738/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Every time we get a contribution, I'm grateful down to my toes.

Because I know whenever someone digs deep and chips in $5, $10, or whatever they can afford, it's because they're raising their hand to say "I'm ready to own a piece of the movement that's going to bring big, structural change for people across the country."

That's why, instead of spending hours on the phone courting mega-wealthy donors for big checks, I like to spend my time calling our grassroots supporters, thanking them for their contribution to our campaign.

It's one of my favorite parts of the day. Because every conversation is a small spark of the democracy we're trying to build together -- one that puts political and economic power into the hands of working people.

**And soon, I'll be making calls again -- thanking a few of the grassroots donors who donate for the first time ahead of Wednesday's debate, whether it's $5, $15, or $50.**

**[Will you be my next call? If you can, chip in whatever makes sense for you and keep an eye on your phone. clean_body: I know whenever someone digs deep and chips in $5, $10, or whatever they can afford, it's because they're raising their hand to say "I'm ready to own a piece of the movement that's going to bring... | | | "" Every time we get a contribution, I'm grateful down to my toes. Because I know whenever someone digs deep and chips in $5, $10, or whatever they can afford, it's because they're raising their hand to say "I'm ready to own a piece of the movement that's going to bring big, structural change for people across the country." That's why, instead of spending hours on the phone courting mega-wealthy donors for big checks, I like to spend my time calling our grassroots supporters, thanking them for their contribution to our campaign. It's one of my favorite parts of the day. Because every conversation is a small spark of the democracy we're trying to build together -- one that puts political and economic power into the hands of working people. And soon, I'll be making calls again -- thanking a few of the grassroots donors who donate for the first time ahead of Wednesday's debate, whether it's $5, $15, or $50. name: Wendy Davis
subject: This would hurt 25 million people, and it's not being talked about
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress](https://go
body:
---
| | Women's reproductive rights are hanging by the barest of threads -- and we need to ensure the Democratic presidential nominee has a plan to stop the GOP's attacks on women and their health. Add your name to urge the moderators of November's primary debate to #AskAboutAbortion!- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - | | Women's reproductive rights are hanging by the barest of threads -- and we need to ensure the Democratic presidential nominee has a plan to stop the GOP's attacks on women and their health. [Add your name to urge the moderators of November's primary debate to #AskAboutAbortion!](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361b73/704929dc/1660bef0/3990393a/4241809898/VEsH/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/sign-the-petition-to-msnbc-and-the-washington-post-askaboutabortion-at-the-november-democratic-debate-2?source=20191021_AskAboutAbortion_WD&referrer=group-wendy-davis-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fdav_monthly_askaboutabortion%3Frefcode%3Ddav_AskAboutAbortionJA%26amount%3D25%26recurring%3Dauto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wendyforcongress&utm_content=1+-+Add+your+name+to+urge+the+moderators+of+&utm_campaign=DAV_EM_EN_191118_AskAboutAbortion_U1_X1")
---
| | [Add Your Name >>](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361b73/704929dc/1660bef0/3990393d/4241809898/VEsE/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/sign-the-petition-to-msnbc-and-the-washington-post-askaboutabortion-at-the-november-democratic-debate-2?source=20191021_AskAboutAbortion_WD&referrer=group-wendy-davis-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fdav_monthly_askaboutabortion%3Frefcode%3Ddav_AskAboutAbortionJA%26amount%3D25%26recurring%3Dauto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wendyforcongress&utm_content=2+-+Add+Your+Name+gtgt&utm_campaign=DAV_EM_EN_191118_AskAboutAbortion_U1_X1")
---
This year, extremist Republican lawmakers passed 26 abortion bans across the country, denying thousands of women basic reproductive health care and forcing many to cross state lines for an abortion.
Donald Trump weaponized his abortion "gag rule" to force Planned Parenthood and thousands of community clinics out of millions of dollars in Title X funding.
And this administration packed our nation's courts with anti-choice justices like Brett Kavanaugh -- setting the stage for the Supreme Court's recent decision to take up a case that could lead to the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_.
**Yet this deliberate attack on women and their health is being left out of the discussion -- in two of the four Democratic primary debates, the candidates were asked zero questions about abortion.**
[**Our reproductive rights are under assault like never before -- and we're not talking about it. On behalf of women everywhere, we must speak out: Sign on to tell MSNBC and the Washington Post to #AskAboutAbortion at the November Democratic debate!**](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361b73/704929dc/1660bef0/3990393c/4241809898/VEsF/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/sign-the-petition-to-msnbc-and-the-washington-post-askaboutabortion-at-the-november-democratic-debate-2?source=20191021_AskAboutAbortion_WD&referrer=group-wendy-davis-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fdav_monthly_askaboutabortion%3Frefcode%3Ddav_AskAboutAbortionJA%26amount%3D25%26recurring%3Dauto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wendyforcongress&utm_content=3+-+Our+reproductive+rights+are+under+assaul&utm_campaign=DAV_EM_EN_191118_AskAboutAbortion_U1_X1")
****| ****| **[Add Your Name](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361b73/704929dc/1660bef0/3990393f/4241809898/VEsC/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/sign-the-petition-to-msnbc-and-the-washington-post-askaboutabortion-at-the-november-democratic-debate-2?source=20191021_AskAboutAbortion_WD&referrer=group-wendy-davis-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fdav_monthly_askaboutabortion%3Frefcode%3Ddav_AskAboutAbortionJA%26amount%3D25%26recurring%3Dauto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wendyforcongress&utm_content=4+-+Add+Your+Name&utm_campaign=DAV_EM_EN_191118_AskAboutAbortion_U1_X1")**
---
**Abortion is not just a women 's issue.** It is a health care issue. An economic issue. A racial justice issue. An LGBTQ+ issue. It is an issue that touches us ALL.
**In Congress, I 'll fight, as I always have, to end assaults on women's reproductive rights by extremist lawmakers.** More than that -- I'll work to ensure our constitutional right to access reproductive health care is protected by law.
And with low-income women, women of color, and women from rural areas set to face the greatest harm as a result of the GOP's attempts to regulate abortion out of existence, **we _need_ to know that our Democratic nominee is committed to the same fight for our freedom and equality.**
[**If you believe it 's crucial that we hear about each Democratic candidate's plan to protect and expand abortion rights and access, add your name to demand moderators #AskAboutAbortion at the next debate!**](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361b73/704929dc/1660bef0/3990393e/4241809898/VEsD/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/sign-the-petition-to-msnbc-and-the-washington-post-askaboutabortion-at-the-november-democratic-debate-2?source=20191021_AskAboutAbortion_WD&referrer=group-wendy-davis-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fdav_monthly_askaboutabortion%3Frefcode%3Ddav_AskAboutAbortionJA%26amount%3D25%26recurring%3Dauto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wendyforcongress&utm_content=5+-+If+you+believe+itrsquos+crucial+that+we+&utm_campaign=DAV_EM_EN_191118_AskAboutAbortion_U1_X1")
****| ****| **[Sign On](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361b73/704929dc/1660bef0/39903931/4241809898/VEsA/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/sign-the-petition-to-msnbc-and-the-washington-post-askaboutabortion-at-the-november-democratic-debate-2?source=20191021_AskAboutAbortion_WD&referrer=group-wendy-davis-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fdav_monthly_askaboutabortion%3Frefcode%3Ddav_AskAboutAbortionJA%26amount%3D25%26recurring%3Dauto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wendyforcongress&utm_content=6+-+Sign+On&utm_campaign=DAV_EM_EN_191118_AskAboutAbortion_U1_X1")**
---
**Abortion is a human right.** We won't let women take a back seat in our country's discussions about what matters most.
We won't be silenced,
Wendy

clean_body: | | Women's reproductive rights are hanging by the barest of threads -- and we need to ensure the Democratic presidential nominee has a plan to stop the GOP's attacks on women and their health. Add your name to urge the moderators of November's primary debate to #AskAboutAbortion!- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - | | Women's reproductive rights are hanging by the barest of threads -- and we need to ensure the Democratic presidential nominee has a plan to stop the GOP's attacks on women and their health. "" | | "" This year, extremist Republican lawmakers passed 26 abortion bans across the country, denying thousands of women basic reproductive health care and forcing many to cross state lines for an abortion. Donald Trump weaponized his abortion "gag rule" to force Planned Parenthood and thousands of community clinics out of millions of dollars in Title X funding. And this administration packed our nation's courts with anti-choice justices like Brett Kavanaugh -- setting the stage for the Supreme Court's recent decision to take up a case that could lead to the overturning of Roe v. Wade. Yet this deliberate attack on women and their health is being left out of the discussion -- in two of the four Democratic primary debates, the candidates were asked zero questions about abortion. "" **| | "" Abortion is not just a women 's issue. It is a health care issue. An economic issue. A racial justice issue. An LGBTQ+ issue. It is an issue that touches us ALL. In Congress, I 'll fight, as I always have, to end assaults on women's reproductive rights by extremist lawmakers. More than that -- I'll work to ensure our constitutional right to access reproductive health care is protected by law. And with low-income women, women of color, and women from rural areas set to face the greatest harm as a result of the GOP's attempts to regulate abortion out of existence, we need to know that our Democratic nominee is committed to the same fight for our freedom and equality. "" | | "" Abortion is a human right.** We won't let women take a back seat in our country's discussions about what matters most. We won't be silenced, Wendy | "" | If you'd like to support Wendy Davis for Congress, you can "" We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can "" If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, "" | "" Wendy Davis for Congress 3112 Windsor Rd. Ste A #525 Austin, TX 78703 mailto:info@wendydavisforcongress.com "" ""

name: Team Betsy
subject: National news for the wrong reasons
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
| |
---
**We had some astounding news in Ohio this week that made national attention, for the wrong reasons.** _ "Ohio state lawmakers propose total abortion ban"_ _ "If public school students turn in work saying the earth is only 10,000 years old, they cannot be penalized under Ohio House Bill 164 if it's their religious beliefs."_ With Ohio Congressman Jim Jordan serving as an attack dog in the impeachment proceedings, Ohio is getting a reputation as the home of extreme right wing politics. To stop extremists from taking over our state and to protect Ohio's future, we need to flip state house seats in 2020. Senate District 18 is going to be an open seat and is one we can turn from Red to Blue. **Please help Betsy Rader run a strong campaign to flip this seat in Northeast Ohio! name: Ed Markey
subject: 🖊Add your name to say NO to offshore drilling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Hello,

President Donald Trump is desperate to open up our coastal waters to Big Oil for drilling.

An oil spill would cripple our economy and devastate our environment. I will never support irresponsible corporate fossil fuel interests over the needs of the businesses, communities, and ecosystems that make up our beautiful coastlines.

_**_**[Stand with me against President Trump and Big Oil. Click here to sign the petition and say no to offshore drilling!](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df7c/693b8b0a/43c8f135/72de7888/1307273499/VEsH/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/atlantic-offshore-drilling/markey/")**_**_

_****[SIGN THE PETITION](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df7c/693b8b0a/43c8f135/72de7888/1307273499/VEsE/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/atlantic-offshore-drilling/markey/")****_
We need to stand up and say NO to offshore drilling and start saying YES to offshore wind farms, solar power, and electric vehicles as the way for the future.

But the Trump administration recently blocked the permitting an 800-megawatt offshore wind farm, leaving tens of thousands of jobs hanging in the balance.

I'm not giving up. The Green New Deal revolution is changing everything, and we're just getting started.

Republicans have a chance to change and work with us to put these policies in place, but if they don't, they are going to be changed at the ballot box.

_**_**[Sign the petition and stand against President Trump and Big Oil. Say NO to offshore drilling!](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df7c/693b8b0a/43c8f135/72de7888/1307273499/VEsF/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/atlantic-offshore-drilling/markey/")**_**_

_****[SIGN THE PETITION](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df7c/693b8b0a/43c8f135/72de7888/1307273499/VEsC/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/atlantic-offshore-drilling/markey/")****_
Thanks,

Ed
---
