Friend,

This weekend, the Democrats gained yet another historic victory in the deep red south.

In Louisiana, a state Trump won by 20 points, the Governor’s race has been called for the Democrat.

Friend, we cannot sit idly by and allow Democrats to continue to compete and win in these typically Republican strongholds. If they can win this year in places like Kentucky and Louisiana - **[then they can win in Montana.](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=ebae396e2146459e911fd13cb3e3fee8&_e=-GPJ7oD0NX1ZuqEZkUOX4Te5yyFeYUkjjzsqVU1BNpeMEG5jYJHfTX3ugL3Do9vg-Rk7oeotp2iJYHv2RUsTTLYP2vfXZ6Xlr-lx1wZX4z5DAHgSBrHyxL2v9_7nKWiv3s3bOTqegK--Qb0hi934ruw2QUtBogs9LmscpAB8Bls6ZO7LAx1P5VR6GWXsJjV917aUaaZMIFg-vlSWWH6N-pXjTA1RkXTN5VcUQ2UDVMDcvbJ0whAZVk3wFCDJd-nAIgxFApkoDvV-mf1p5T_uin2vwoud-O-rZx53t61rsrNgesUJOXw1ie-vlMKGdZ3eFUqBH__GHq7Noe1z_cHH2EkgzH51cKUrt1GAhuGy0nmcGHvk4G6II2Y5W-2cYuob1elpjDGQAOv4hO8OtQ_1pA%3D%3D)**

Chuck Schumer, Nancy Pelosi, and the Radical Left see our Montana U.S. Senate seat as their only path back to the majority, so **[your support right now is critical to help us bolster our campaign war-chest before Democrats seize on their growing national momentum and target Montana.](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=ebae396e2146459e911fd13cb3e3fee8&_e=-GPJ7oD0NX1ZuqEZkUOX4Te5yyFeYUkjjzsqVU1BNpeMEG5jYJHfTX3ugL3Do9vg-Rk7oeotp2iJYHv2RUsTTLYP2vfXZ6Xlr-lx1wZX4z5DAHgSBrHyxL2v9_7nKWiv3s3bOTqegK--Qb0hi934ruw2QUtBogs9LmscpAB8Blt1l-b3_95XqZRXb6ln3eRMiuF7a2gZq1HsERgm_jMdheYAVolTDxKTkwr1JwthHv9XYx7xJy-AKJ_KWGMFlNcZWgZWtA8e6E6kHZ2-xVy67GaLvIY9ZD5Pt57rkg2hI7xLA2Hgif1EX_njaeHqhK4dxhuqKdvrRxiqNZGtfS8L1njj8DgDAwggLZ5etMaiKuh5yeQgNjpAGdrzh8d7R4ikVm7ZYlaXWEfYokFR0aOl-A%3D%3D)**

clean_body: We cannot sit idly by and allow Democrats to continue to compete and win in these typically Republican strongholds. We cannot sit idly by and allow Democrats to continue to compete and win in these typically Republican strongholds. Don't want to receive our emails? | Friend, This weekend, the Democrats gained yet another historic victory in the deep red south. In Louisiana, a state Trump won by 20 points, the Governor’s race has been called for the Democrat. Friend, we cannot sit idly by and allow Democrats to continue to compete and win in these typically Republican strongholds. If they can win this year in places like Kentucky and Louisiana - Chuck Schumer, Nancy Pelosi, and the Radical Left see our Montana U.S. Senate seat as their only path back to the majority, so It’s time to step up, Friend. | We can’t under any circumstances let the Democrats’ recent victories these past few weeks distract us from stopping socialism from infecting and spreading across our country. Thanks, Senator Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. mailto:info@stevedaines.com | | | ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

_Take a minute to[ _**read Tom’s health care plan here**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBguGO1iUd2XLcKbWoq181-2BU2Q4VRH9mbw9sFmzAU6ZDTBAV2olVW4gr5AsKHy0g8ZsqXol0Wo4d6WSLZUs6b1L27o8-2FqeEcVnyleEMCyCySZa7jXOfmI1xR-2FRXQEczLNgUIigM-2FTbN5Cd-2BX-2Bpj4DeCev1ppRKkkAMJSxavc-2BHd7f-2FthlXgUkbBegJ05N-2BtWXldmgS6K4Xb9kOolKKv0EPUgiWQ4rhHjRSmS3IQhDTbQg_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFcKDGEHmkOpl1tI9H0ZOp-2BfqwEVaUFNbJ6-2BOZHmF-2FzmPPVSyTIClUaOH7AuFvnQn-2BxnyVlLMnMtH87nXnREhhm6SkA8Cjq3NzLfWhNKF6HA3nij8KEykWk5KG6mXmsdjSdZTdcB9irLXqF8VlpQrGZNBN9sUAN63nWvQ2BacmrJ4r-2BDbc-2BXoSQNbdDbAgBElzo2uDhUkEHrGSCm-2BRvLj8nuTJWBJ5H70VK-2FQ8jgwEAccup-2FdoiGHe7MVKKgSLOKTQp9wDgE9Vw-2BAlKQ9d0ihoTIEE9RvEASLyXNEUo3-2FMiVfO-2FqnCQvf3dMe3DKuCC9JFZnWLAzftaZha-2FFbTneFFq1g87FX47LIQgaRRZ8KcZyDA-3D-3D). And then, please help get Tom’s message of breaking the corporate stranglehold, including on our health care system, on the December debate stage by [_**donating here**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBp8P9ONZnN8l-2Ffw22HZRSC1mFfjCO0JskafmRGtoRfu5cH6hxQvS29lzVgnBnGhaB5kEGy6n7cB8dDiiQ-2Fg1r0cbGiFoaeEvzg7TNKqpkFYedYcUnjkZ9uRJioEylFTEeckGslLA-2Behxf2Gv5P7AV4tlg4xNVXoGJHZwqe-2BA0ed9F81as9DNzTS2GKJAcQ-2F-2FWh0v2iC-2FAsnsV5rGdG5HQaDC9qa2f9pYaeLwtIBpaXzF_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFcKDGEHmkOpl1tI9H0ZOp-2BfqwEVaUFNbJ6-2BOZHmF-2FzmPPVSyTIClUaOH7AuFvnQn-2BxnyVlLMnMtH87nXnREhhm6SkA8Cjq3NzLfWhNKF6HA3nij8KEykWk5KG6mXmsdjSfI1xbPpkJStre4dWP4dEaLJQtOAxYA9RETZ-2BdwiAb56q6nwcRdwBjQoowEe7asIKWQ3hEKrygzDw5E4gU-2FvAlsz2CXZixCI66OLAYndRmDZH6bpi1IGBuJPPXnFUFhs8G4nO4-2FdOIiUO8b3OR2iJpRv4hpERIfWZLfsMIoC0ouWsAtTdYhmJUMzVd26Tgt07EJMvkTdM1yh21n-2BFQ8R4tm5xWFUqC8zTVuzXPOfkQE9w-3D-3D)._ Friend, Every minute, an American goes bankrupt because they can’t afford to pay for the cost of health care. Necessary medication is out of reach, and too expensive for many families. Hospitals are closing across the country, leaving many rural communities without access to basic care. Nurses and medical workers are overworked and underpaid. **It’s time to reform this system that prioritizes corporate greed over our health and well-being.** Tom’s framework, The Right to Health, will build a universal health care system that lets people choose the right plan for their needs. It also creates a competitive public option to keep private insurers in check and stop them from gouging the vulnerable with exorbitant drug prices. This plan reaffirms Tom’s commitment to cover young people under 26, those living with preexisting conditions, and communities often left out of conversations around health care — such as tribal nations, folks in need of mental health care, immigrants, those affected by opioids, and veterans. [_**Please take a moment to read over the plan — let’s work together to fundamentally transform health care in America.**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBguGO1iUd2XLcKbWoq181-2BU2Q4VRH9mbw9sFmzAU6ZDTBAV2olVW4gr5AsKHy0g8ZsqXol0Wo4d6WSLZUs6b1L27o8-2FqeEcVnyleEMCyCySZa7jXOfmI1xR-2FRXQEczLNgUIigM-2FTbN5Cd-2BX-2Bpj4DeCev1ppRKkkAMJSxavc-2BHd7f-2FthlXgUkbBegJ05N-2BtWXldmgS6K4Xb9kOolKKv0EPUgiWQ4rhHjRSmS3IQhDTbQg_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFcKDGEHmkOpl1tI9H0ZOp-2BfqwEVaUFNbJ6-2BOZHmF-2FzmPPVSyTIClUaOH7AuFvnQn-2BxnyVlLMnMtH87nXnREhhm6SkA8Cjq3NzLfWhNKF6HA3nij8KEykWk5KG6mXmsdjSdkFvyHw78i1fcfmWwlRSkjZOOjwLOewOEC8uQw6M3gHGl9-2B496t6i8-2FSywtrYw0ecU2I8CGGPuK-2FjOtYV0jWwdlL-2BYlxL4QFIqMu8a6-2F6HrG8LPcKysizFfEzr-2BvtEqHw1g6pDWRgspSc18kJL4h4Cs-2BBmbnXPYAsiicBQ7z1LshzvOtFdgzlMZH6z7IWmn1cJDLZ3fFs7FBCpH93p2kyDcjvVvmL-2FpQzmh27VD7GqWQ-3D-3D) Health care is your right, not a privilege reserved for the wealthy. In health and wellness,
Tom 2020

clean_body: | | | | Take a minute to. And then, please help get Tom’s message of breaking the corporate stranglehold, including on our health care system, on the December debate stage by . Friend, Every minute, an American goes bankrupt because they can’t afford to pay for the cost of health care. Necessary medication is out of reach, and too expensive for many families. Hospitals are closing across the country, leaving many rural communities without access to basic care. Nurses and medical workers are overworked and underpaid. It’s time to reform this system that prioritizes corporate greed over our health and well-being. Tom’s framework, The Right to Health, will build a universal health care system that lets people choose the right plan for their needs. It also creates a competitive public option to keep private insurers in check and stop them from gouging the vulnerable with exorbitant drug prices. This plan reaffirms Tom’s commitment to cover young people under 26, those living with preexisting conditions, and communities often left out of conversations around health care — such as tribal nations, folks in need of mental health care, immigrants, those affected by opioids, and veterans. Health care is your right, not a privilege reserved for the wealthy. In health and wellness, Tom 2020 | [PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]() We want to make sure you're receiving relevant information about this movement. name: Greg Stanton
subject: [SIGN ON] protect the Grand Canyon from mining
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Earlier this month, I was proud to join with a bipartisan majority of my colleagues in the House of Representatives to pass the _Grand Canyon Centennial Protection Act_ , a bill I co-sponsored that will permanently ban uranium mining and extraction from about 1 million acres of land surrounding the Grand Canyon.
**This bill will protect this critical environment from exploitation and will ensure continuing respect for this land that is sacred to many of Arizona 's tribal communities.**
But now we need your help to make sure Mitch McConnell lets the US Senate take up this important vote to protect one of our nation's natural wonders.
[**Will you sign on to DEMAND Mitch McConnell let the US Senate vote to protect the Grand Canyon from uranium mining?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/0BW3j9tYSb7Xl-JGmspRw5NbikP1ZSIykB0wPgDzK7Y=/wEi7_E5MlIGOF3NMajWg8XTyOTJ5AIplhcT05K8hZzM=)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/0BW3j9tYSb7Xl-JGmspRw5NbikP1ZSIykB0wPgDzK7Y=/wEi7_E5MlIGOF3NMajWg8XTyOTJ5AIplhcT05K8hZzM=)
The _Grand Canyon Centennial Protection Act_ has the support of The Wilderness Society, The Sierra Club, The Navajo Nation, The Trust for Public Land, and a broad bipartisan coalition of supporters.
**Unfortunately, special interests and dark money lobbyists are already organizing to try to get this critical bill killed in the US Senate by Mitch McConnell. We need your help to fight back!**
[**SIGN YOUR NAME TO DEMAND MITCH McCONNELL ALLOWS A VOTE ON THE _GRAND CANYON CENTENNIAL PROTECTION ACT_ »**](https://act.myngp.com/el/0BW3j9tYSb7Xl-JGmspRw5NbikP1ZSIykB0wPgDzK7Y=/wEi7_E5MlIGOF3NMajWg8XTyOTJ5AIplhcT05K8hZzM=)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/0BW3j9tYSb7Xl-JGmspRw5NbikP1ZSIykB0wPgDzK7Y=/wEi7_E5MlIGOF3NMajWg8XTyOTJ5AIplhcT05K8hZzM=)

Thanks for taking action,
\-- _Representative Greg Stanton_

Paid for by Stanton for Congress
---

Suite 21-518
Phoenix AZ 85018 United States

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Phantom Canyon Brewing Company
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
I love the story of the Wynkoop, but in a way, the story of the Phantom is an even better representation of what I want this campaign to be about. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771440/691c9bd/6f8708ef/11a7e618/4282382294/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_template")
---
| Team, you know how much I love good beer, good food, and a great story.

That's why, last week, I was so happy to visit the Phantom Canyon Brewing Company in Colorado Springs. In the case of the Phantom, it was also a walk down memory lane--and a reminder of what folks can achieve by working together.

Not too long after we got the Wynkoop Brewing Company going in 1988--a labor of love that involved renovating the century-old J.S. Brown Mercantile Building in downtown Denver--I got an invitation to look at another beautiful old building down in the Springs.

That building was the Old Cheyenne Hotel. It happened to be the only registered historical landmark in town. And it was scheduled for demolition.

I just couldn't see the Cheyenne meet that fate, so with a vision similar to what we'd achieved in Denver with the Wynkoop, I bought the building from the bank.

But we couldn't raise the full funding we needed from investors alone. So the subcontractors who worked on the project--the electrician, the plumber, the sprinkler installer, and more--pooled $150,000 to put into the project, and we became partners.

**That 's how we built Phantom Canyon Brewing Company nearly three decades ago. Here I am stopping by last Tuesday:** [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191118_JH_20191118-fr-JH-brewerysl-2mo_2mo_i1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=") I love the story of the Wynkoop, but in a way, the story of the Phantom is an even better representation of what I want this campaign to be about.

Today, I'm asking you to be our partners in transforming Colorado--not just some of it, for some of us in certain areas, but the entire state, for all of us. That work takes people from all walks of life pitching in to do their part.

**I 'm running to be a leader in Washington who stands up for our state, and to put an end to the era of selling out our priorities for the Trump/McConnell agenda.** [**_Can you chip in now to help me do it?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191118_JH_20191118-fr-JH-brewerysl-2mo_2mo_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Thank you,

John [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191118_JH_20191118-fr-JH-brewerysl-2mo_2mo_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper for Colorado team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771440/691c9bd/6f8708ef/11a7e614/4282382294/VEsD/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771440/691c9bd/6f8708ef/11a7e615/4282382294/VEsA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771440/691c9bd/6f8708ef/11a7e612/4282382294/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771440/691c9bd/6f8708ef/11a7e613/4282382294/VEsO/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771440/691c9bd/6f8708ef/11a7e610/4282382294/VEsP/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771440/691c9bd/6f8708ef/11a7e611/4282382294/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information [_**here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771440/691c9bd/6f8708ef/11a7e614/4282382294/VEsHBA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer").

name: Team Monika
subject: We need Monika in Congress.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONIKA FOR CONGRESS
body:
Our country has gone too long allowing a culture that permits sexual and domestic violence.

| [](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d976/7dfbb003/42ac4c16/5527b43a/118259757/VEsH/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191118_em_change&recurring=auto&refcode2=header&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=rtw_20191118_em_change&source=rtw_20191118_em_change")
---
Friend,

We need to be very clear about what the current state of our government is.

**We have sitting public officials with accusations of sexual misconduct serving our country.**

Our country has gone too long allowing a culture that permits sexual and domestic violence. It's hurting survivors, women, men and children.

But we can do something about it. All Monika's life, she has fought for survivors of sexual and domestic violence--during her work as a crisis center counselor, as Executive Director of the North Carolina Coalition Against Sexual Assault, and on the Wake County Board of Education.

It's time for a fierce fighter for survivors in Congress--and that's Monika.

**But she needs your help.**

[**This campaign is funded by your support alone. Please chip in $25 to help us build a strong foundation and unseat Representative George Holding, who has never had the interests of survivors in mind.**](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d976/7dfbb003/42ac4c16/5527b43b/118259757/VEsE/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191118_em_change&recurring=auto&refcode2=CTA1&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=2+-+This+campaign+is+funded+by+your+support+&utm_campaign=rtw_20191118_em_change&source=rtw_20191118_em_change") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5»](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d976/7dfbb003/42ac4c16/5527b438/118259757/VEsF/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191118_em_change&recurring=auto&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode2=EL5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=3+-+5raquo&utm_campaign=rtw_20191118_em_change&source=rtw_20191118_em_change")

clean_body: Our country has gone too long allowing a culture that permits sexual and domestic violence. | "" Friend, We need to be very clear about what the current state of our government is. We have sitting public officials with accusations of sexual misconduct serving our country. Our country has gone too long allowing a culture that permits sexual and domestic violence. It's hurting survivors, women, men and children. But we can do something about it. All Monika's life, she has fought for survivors of sexual and domestic violence--during her work as a crisis center counselor, as Executive Director of the North Carolina Coalition Against Sexual Assault, and on the Wake County Board of Education. It's time for a fierce fighter for survivors in Congress--and that's Monika. But she needs your help. body:
| | Hey, what have you been up to this year? Cause Mitch McConnell has done **nothing,** yet he still has a job _(and we plan on doing something about that)_.

**This year:** House Democrats have passed legislation on CLIMATE ACTION, GUN VIOLENCE PREVENTION, and LOWERING HEALTHCARE COSTS.

**This year:** None of these bills have even been voted on in the Senate! In fact, Mitch McConnell has bragged about creating a legislative graveyard.

**I need to raise $75,000 in the next 12 days**.

Friend,

**We recently passed the midpoint of 4th and final fundraising quarter of the year**. From the time that I announced my campaign to take on the Republican establishment, and keep Georgia’s 7th District in Republican hands, more than 13,000 patriots have contributed to my campaign. **Without such support, I would have had to drop out months ago**.

Now, the year is coming to a close and **my primary race is reaching a critical point in time** : Am I going to be able to continue raising the necessary funds to keep pace with the Party’s preferred candidates – who can self-fund – _or are we going to come up short?_

My campaign to be the 2nd-ever black female Republican member of Congress wouldn’t have even been possible without the support of generous donors like you, Friend. Now, with the end of the year coming into focus, **[I’m asking from the bottom of my heart if you would open up your wallet to help me continue the fight.](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=5f385f86dd7141a79afa2dc778c827aa&_e=OF8il1_Cmuk8BAWJghgx-CRpDppg3rQOsjBHb9KBIbR0QQqmAEM2zrsPtNHCd__A7gHhfP8hGu_u4zsndh8TTzptCZRzdyZufEA3-2MghImogI3DySRtLkOpyhRJCiXa-nyd9W65YiRJmLiGOHkc_235jigO5-NrUfAefrIk3WStpU_y4OM5eFJD9-9859gbt4mLoysLexev2MM9LwP-C2fjGYJCKPziuqgoflKNi9UmQjXw0O0vpqxUeEuYgrCBkb5iQn2Lb7IHqog01PphVwynC2fTYUrtTItqwmSHibHsivw-6A0oIyLYx1yRXI1x)**

To remain competitive in my race, **I need to raise $75,000 in the next 12 days**. Are you able to help me chip away at that figure today?
| [**Donate $3 »**](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=5f385f86dd7141a79afa2dc778c827aa&_e=OF8il1_Cmuk8BAWJghgx-CRpDppg3rQOsjBHb9KBIbR0QQqmAEM2zrsPtNHCd__A7gHhfP8hGu_u4zsndh8TTzptCZRzdyZufEA3-2MghImGz0hS5uBYrLRkkv4c27MvOk9biQ5_MMZnTJudOn8ZETbMkInze2gvoEr2h2eoB4728OyknqJjckYgiM_vYhLuS7LypLszkqZ-NEO9Of69Zla8KgIjkjoC0XuCn8X1C8AyUvOqYOFfkLtYoAWr0zZ8EIFykxt3XxbuUWqPY09a4q5lAZSnA3qI9NEF9rlO13wIDfkRSL5qIbswrZ71xpGS)

I read the feedback that my campaign receives from these email solicitations, and I realize that **I’m a stranger from Georgia who is asking you to take a chance on the unknown**.

So, if you haven’t heard what my voice sounds like, haven’t followed me on social media, or even read one of my emails in some months, take a moment to watch my recent segment on One America News Network!
[](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=5f385f86dd7141a79afa2dc778c827aa&_e=OF8il1_Cmuk8BAWJghgx-CRpDppg3rQOsjBHb9KBIbR0QQqmAEM2zrsPtNHCd__A7gHhfP8hGu_u4zsndh8TTzptCZRzdyZufEA3-2MghIlqdY-M7DFSV6TGnyYTgRhqj7l2-UpGQ3Wn3BfSDvudFF9GIR78piml3_9BRFc2BvTMPHZxgS1t-semsPUVjH2xTayZ3guMzmyYA92GNR9VaGiyw8EzPz_uf0Cq-NjlIg6t23mbiEZr2SAkC4PziVIewjizN2qrDwuy4k2UM98WEvYdY1-R792J3-Q0qhrVXixFnhv2reWUtICm8CYAyXEi) [**WATCH ME DISCUSS MY CAMPAIGN ON OAN! »**](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=5f385f86dd7141a79afa2dc778c827aa&_e=OF8il1_Cmuk8BAWJghgx-CRpDppg3rQOsjBHb9KBIbR0QQqmAEM2zrsPtNHCd__A7gHhfP8hGu_u4zsndh8TTzptCZRzdyZufEA3-2MghIlVQo9RSRpaGMgjgHWGTb68euAcij-MbaRH2WeEEU83vx8IoRiWzc1oINwoQOV8muCyA5Qk7z1VJnNL4uMGPEYnhtqY89A-RwOu2t7mHhIhnJ8x-dmnc4YNibSdZCXto_sfRNm5_2gscHmFRGCMg-p3D5wG_DBZb4mVfb9QPSXO12gHG9X_gbCuhXSUUVhe604hPswR73z319kK7d9VpaLB)

I’m running for Congress to prove false the inaccurate perception that African American voters won’t vote Republican.

I’m running to be a congressional ally of President Trump! He needs re-enforcements! When I get there, I will:
* Take on AOC and the “The Squad”

clean_body: To remain in this race, I need to raise $75,000 before December 1stThe do-nothing Democrat-controlled House of Representatives has NO TIME for you Don't want to receive our emails? | I need to raise $75,000 in the next 12 days. Friend, We recently passed the midpoint of 4th and final fundraising quarter of the year. From the time that I announced my campaign to take on the Republican establishment, and keep Georgia’s 7th District in Republican hands, more than 13,000 patriots have contributed to my campaign. Without such support, I would have had to drop out months ago. Now, the year is coming to a close and my primary race is reaching a critical point in time : Am I going to be able to continue raising the necessary funds to keep pace with the Party’s preferred candidates – who can self-fund – or are we going to come up short? My campaign to be the 2nd-ever black female Republican member of Congress wouldn’t have even been possible without the support of generous donors like you, Friend. Now, with the end of the year coming into focus, To remain competitive in my race, I need to raise $75,000 in the next 12 days. Are you able to help me chip away at that figure today? | You’re donation today will go towards canvasing operations around the district, hiring additional staff as I continue to professionalize my operations, and go into a savings account intended for commercial advertising next year (Atlanta is big and EXPENSIVE) I read the feedback that my campaign receives from these email solicitations, and I realize that I’m a stranger from Georgia who is asking you to take a chance on the unknown. So, if you haven’t heard what my voice sounds like, haven’t followed me on social media, or even read one of my emails in some months, take a moment to watch my recent segment on One America News Network! I’m running for Congress to prove false the inaccurate perception that African American voters won’t vote Republican. I’m running to be a congressional ally of President Trump! He needs re-enforcements! When I get there, I will: Take on AOC and the “The Squad” Fight for prison reform * Work to find a solution to the border crisis PUT AMERICA FIRST I'm so grateful to you, Friend Blessings always, Dr. Lerah Lee | Paid for by Lerah Lee for Congress

name: Team Yang
subject: New Goal: 750K contributions by debate night. Can you help out by chipping in now?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Let’s make Andrew proud by hitting this goal.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=3224%2E377263%2EVWTH5m) Yang Gang --

Every one of us is here to win the election and get Andrew in the White House. That means crushing fundraising goals, qualifying for debates, rising in the polls, and ultimately, making Andrew the Democratic nominee so he can beat Trump in 2020. It also means we keep building our momentum and surpassing all expectations.

We know that if enough of the Yang Gang makes enough noise, the media, the establishment, and the entire country will not be able to ignore this movement.

Let’s make A LOT of noise this week by hitting a new goal our team just set: **750,000 total campaign contributions by debate night this Wednesday.** So far, there have been over 734,554 contributions made and we're 97.9% of the way there. [Pitch in $10 or whatever you can to help us get the rest of the way: ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17108?t=5&akid=3224%2E377263%2EVWTH5m) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17108?t=13&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=3224%2E377263%2EVWTH5m)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17108?t=12&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=3224%2E377263%2EVWTH5m)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17108?t=11&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=3224%2E377263%2EVWTH5m)
---
| | [$100»](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17108?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=3224%2E377263%2EVWTH5m)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17108?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=3224%2E377263%2EVWTH5m)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17108?t=8&amount=25&akid=3224%2E377263%2EVWTH5m)
---
This grassroots movement is real.

You can feel it. We can feel it. We are all in this because we know, without a shadow of a doubt, that Andrew will lead this country with Humanity First policies, heart, and a new way forward for all of us.

You’ve built this movement into a force like no other in this race. It’s the kind of power that will help us hit this goal with as much enthusiasm as all the others.

[Please, chip in $10 or more so we can reach 750,000 contributions by the time Andrew takes the debate stage.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17108?t=7&akid=3224%2E377263%2EVWTH5m)
[Chip In](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17108?t=6&akid=3224%2E377263%2EVWTH5m)
---
Andrew makes us proud every day. Let’s make him proud by reaching this goal by debate night. **Each contribution counts, so give as many times as you can and give it all you’ve got, Yang Gang.**

Proud to be in this together,

Team Yang
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Chip In](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17108?t=14&akid=3224%2E377263%2EVWTH5m)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=3224%2E377263%2EVWTH5m) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=3224%2E377263%2EVWTH5m) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

Contributions are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Under federal law, individuals may contribute a maximum of $2800 for the primary election, $2,800 for the primary run-off election, and $2,800 for the general election. Couples may make contributions from a joint account, but each contributor must sign the check (or other written instrument) or a statement that accompanies the contribution. Qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $5,000 for the primary election and $5,000 for the general election. Non-qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $2,800 for the primary election and $2,800 for the general election. Contributions from federal government contractors and corporations are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in an election cycle.
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Please do not reply to this email as this address is not monitored.
We believe that email is a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters, but you can click [here](http://url6083.hunt4congress.com/wf/unsubscribe?upn=enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCHB8JQPLvmw8rA5dKQOp3z7EhGi2IXfh0IJ7vpMIew03Qj0rvdFN-2BFIStnzaeeuYRnk33eF6bszacwLNssMCSDD90uTuLsatAFgkV54dUt-2FelPGIiziPjVCbnEHfBflD-2BLXB5Dk8G8Hm3tdPI8XoWO24hkZGGjXFs1ttQVzEhhZpZurztGU-2Bc7qy-2FYinhtpQ7Vk1vz9UYOKMTtDbQGzCl-2FMxjZTjTPjpFJxtufZfabXUOXtstOXY6XBS6-2BPTR93rjosX19-2BvIM-2BVzQ1vHMOv6BnuPjMu0JA8rjeNewblKqqMTDOG7rJMbRNoV5GEdmmofz-2FHSFibKfCZbyhoSJgJ-2B09OFBgqCe23nqEgQJ0drk4mTQwfX2ayTAKOuvCfcxIJEH0yvBsvDkkck5wUMHFUkmoH7X13s0ieein2dUVQfF-2F-2FXD0Ohe2lX7WdNCTUwj8vsiJ9JM824WObw5p-2F4XzZ94DvtaqnSyePTKivINuH99bB0SdIeTIZJM4uxQedXPB4iXp6vURUIcSBFyhPwkJytWLF9B-2BeUyKFH-2BwGCpry1XMQZUIaK5bFn7Z0nwo5jjfEJVr-2FuEoEvIZTej-2FVPHoL7ROkux-2FAoEMOPf1h4xEY-2BeSOrF5gsEv7ejS9jJW7zqpCjDqSmjym1VJlX56loSwrLKo) if you would like to unsubscribe from these messages.

name: Mike Turner
subject: Schiff's secret dealings
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CITIZENS FOR TURNER
body:
This message contains graphics. If you do not see the graphics, [click here to view](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/MailView?ms=NDExMzkzNDkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&j=MTY0MTY0ODQ5MQS2&mt=1&rt=0).

Adam Schiff is holding public hearings where his witnesses have never even met or discussed Ukraine with President Trump!
If you would prefer not to receive future emails, [visit here.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=NDExMzkzNDkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MTY0ODQ5MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[ ](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=NDExMzkzNDkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MTY0ODQ5MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Peter,
Before impeachment was made public, Adam Schiff scheduled **TEN** closed door witness impeachment interviews. Now, Adam Schiff is holding public hearings where his witnesses have never even met or discussed Ukraine with President Trump!
We cannot allow Schiff to continue his politically charged impeachment investigation! [_**Sign my team 's petition TODAY to hold Schiff accountable! **_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=NDExMzkzNDkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MTY0ODQ5MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Secrecy has no place in Congress. I believe in upholding the Constitution and with that, transparency in government. Adam Schiff has demonstrated his disregard for both of these.
We can't allow Schiff to continue this unfair and politically motivated investigation into the President. [_**Adam Schiff needs to be held accountable!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=NDExMzkzNDkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MTY0ODQ5MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[_**Will you sign my petition?**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=NDExMzkzNDkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MTY0ODQ5MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[_**Join me in holding Adam Schiff accountable today!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=NDExMzkzNDkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MTY0ODQ5MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
House leadership has lost sight of what is important: [**_improving the lives of Americans!_**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=NDExMzkzNDkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MTY0ODQ5MQS2&mt=1&rt=0) Instead of continuing this broken, partisan process, Washington **SHOULD** be focusing on important issues like improving our healthcare, ending the opioid epidemic, and so many others.
However, Schiff and Nancy Pelosi have refused to address these critical issues and instead are continuing on their divisive, partisan impeachment investigation.
For months now, I have joined my colleagues in calling for Schiff to step aside. It is clear that something larger scale is necessary to get the message across loud and clear.
[_**J**_ _**_**oin**_ thousands of patriots and sign onto our petition today!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=NDExMzkzNDkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MTY0ODQ5MQS2&mt=1&rt=0) It's time Schiff is held accountable for his actions.
[_**Do you agree that Adam Schiff should drop his politically motivated investigation?**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=22&ms=NDExMzkzNDkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MTY0ODQ5MQS2&mt=1&rt=0) Let us know!
Together, we can send him our loud and clear message.
Thank you,

Mike Turner
**[**Sign On Today**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=NDExMzkzNDkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MTY0ODQ5MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

For months now, I have joined my colleagues in calling for Schiff to step aside. It is clear that something larger scale is necessary to get the message across loud and clear. It's time Schiff is held accountable for his actions. Let us know! Together, we can send him our loud and clear message. Thank you, Mike Turner PAID FOR BY CITIZENS FOR TURNER 120 W. Second St. #1510 Dayton, OH 45402 If you would prefer not to receive future emails,

body:
MJ wants to hear what's on your mind -- whether it's health care, climate change, gun safety, or something else entirely.

|

---
Peter,

We know MJ can win in the nation's largest battleground state. **Senator John Cornyn 's approval rating is even lower than Ted Cruz's,** and _The Hill_ recently reported that "the Democratic Senate field is led by [MJ] Hegar."

Texans are clearly tired of being sold out to special interests. While Senator Cornyn has spent nearly 20 years serving everyone _except_ Texans, from Big Pharma to the gun lobby, MJ's running a campaign focused on the needs of Texas families.

**But if MJ 's going to run a campaign focused on you, she needs to know which issues you care about the most! [That's why we're asking grassroots supporters to complete a quick digital interview and tell MJ what matters most to you in this election.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909f9/7f51f7bc/4be2638a/4ef0aa9a/412891135/VEsF/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://mjfortexas.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/mj-digitalinterview")**

Whether it's lowering the cost of health care and prescription drugs, protecting our communities from climate change, keeping our kids safe from gun violence, or something else entirely, MJ wants to hear what's on your mind. **[Complete our quick two-minute digital interview now and let her know>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909f9/7f51f7bc/4be2638a/4ef0aa9a/412891135/VEsD/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://mjfortexas.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/mj-digitalinterview")**

Thanks,
Team MJ

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Donald Trumps of the world
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is:
body:
The kind of politics that lets the Donald Trumps of the world think they can get away with anything doesn’t work for us anymore. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/3gA/ni0YAA/t.2wt/MWXHYNujQ0mkOhC4DDIx1g/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNI6ZD1Rt5h1a2lEaSmdVgH7URFPhPry-2FNABk34HQndvTolN886KULTLhJnZMedEVvuUyPuO2t4Q3JBq6QfBTHYn4sGpK-2BHa2PlACPZB6PA363rivm-2F-2FEB6S28jDotPnl4EGuLZk0q92bS-2Bh1aiMAqeVcYAkfgRo5PWW2fbq28EsVEmK0nnXY1AZu28-2BD0BmrMtX2sxYj8EuUANNtMt69Kx6lRs7QXRQ-2Bws6joEbb4XJGbGBsL5BbN4lNAn3hOfju5b7skKSgYWdJhYm9XYoIkFH/EtfU)
Friend, welcome to the Twilight Zone. We have a man in the White House who has now lobbied _several_ foreign governments to interfere with our elections, openly bragged about it, and has thus far avoided any real accountability for any of his criminal actions. **I believe that no one is above the law, especially the President of the United States.** It’s one of the reasons why I jumped into this race and was proud to be the first Democratic candidate for Congress in New York’s 17th District to support the call for impeachment. During moments like these, we can’t afford to hesitate.******[Will you donate $5 or more to our grassroots campaign so I can go to D.C. and make sure we have leaders in Congress who will fight for accountability?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/3gA/ni0YAA/t.2wt/MWXHYNujQ0mkOhC4DDIx1g/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNI6ZD1Rt5h1a2lEaSmdVgH7URFPhPry-2FNABk34HQndvTolN886KULTLhJnZMedEVvv-2F4N-2F68ScnFYQt-2FO-2BnamrBrqJJjs0mADriEA99fCuBX4Q5prMco-2BAzg2uDdEL4Y8tkXw-2BHsle3bMHG5XLzWzdv5Hut8ESwJkj-2FCNAWWSyvSmUcjQaxCGFofryrj9ZqAHjnJP0Pn9QQlguIVR9lFrR-2BGy-2BBOJM0Y-2BUzUye1pQOwUfJ3-2BQr-2Bk0S66heuMJwjO4Jpfh6GUzzmIgXGMlVihWxd/4-k9)****_[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/3gA/ni0YAA/t.2wt/MWXHYNujQ0mkOhC4DDIx1g/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNI6ZD1Rt5h1a2lEaSmdVgH7URFPhPry-2FNABk34HQndvTolN886KULTLhJnZMedEVvuL568gFUcnXfMKM7uMISLuE8WJgrkuJTKUIczuouwKcs-2FEUqHNyNKjp6m8T8LDguCZt53Y-2BSGwBgZtFzU7mS9UUj509msPz6hRFNCXlNlxfMfS-2FQIvbBOAEV-2F8spsp7JByK5OSFObfeF937TySjX3gWG79TnnQmPP00s4FkJZBf7TSMpIjNv7gkmrPvkcJbep4pWZ-2F3vzuQmCZh0ttU-2FCT/9-eC)_** [Give $5 »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/3gA/ni0YAA/t.2wt/MWXHYNujQ0mkOhC4DDIx1g/h3/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNI6ZD1Rt5h1a2lEaSmdVgH7URFPhPry-2FNABk34HQndvTolN886KULTLhJnZMedEVvuFcjNtR1Y-2FwASiGjcDvOnqATmHbiqI94y-2F72Q-2FZAcnhVEp8nT0ceJV3mY0TJU3FmIHP6KuI-2BChbCnquQkVRWWU-2BDnkNg5qWUV3uFwlJHq6N-2F-2BRPyYAMSRhDxwDS1dOMRLrQ0tFn982RCCF7I643FTo6ObzxcCsWlpI9FpMYIMgnFHhTch1s6p3NEisr9cBq0BoIgZ9NxroCzplMpyInZPa/6a5M) **** Last week, Congress formally began public impeachment hearings. We’re now officially getting closer to the truth. But we have to remember that impeachment hearings are only the first step toward getting justice for all of Trump’s wrongdoing and illegal actions. _Trump didn’t do all of this on his own._ We also need to replace every Congressperson and Senator who is blindly defending Trump’s criminal behavior. We need to elect brave leaders who care more about doing what’s right than doing what’s politically popular. In this time of great division, we have the chance to stand up and say **enough is enough**. The kind of politics that lets the Donald Trumps of the world think they can get away with anything doesn’t work for us anymore. **But, to do that, we need to grow our grassroots, people-powered movement as much as we can.[Will you help send me to Congress so I can always be the first to speak out when there’s wrongdoing?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/3gA/ni0YAA/t.2wt/MWXHYNujQ0mkOhC4DDIx1g/h4/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNI6ZD1Rt5h1a2lEaSmdVgH7URFPhPry-2FNABk34HQndvTolN886KULTLhJnZMedEVvuaGTV0hD2WrE1-2FO8UdGcyesEsmyAVAp4XAR5rOzC7XaU33-2BHCN26dq9YAKTggcpOLpm3lQg9jGZsx6i6fzyg-2BtC4xXaLzcc1DeP7RUnjEKsT1L6RLymRo2VktwpYaCodvTKNoP7YAWDTj2ezbmAR76AOz-2B1iC5VhCexHR03vP40rPYjN7675K1fKt-2F7VA0XWrkztdMDGfOZiw4kilhzNYK/5b4j) ** Let’s do this together, Mondaire

I’ll be direct: [**I’m emailing to ask if you’ll spare $5 today to help my Democratic campaign beat Trump’s biggest enabler in the House, Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11997802/122877948/10128690?refcode=20191118-EM-E1-DF-T0F1S1C1-IN3&amount=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,1000,2800&recurring=1&refcode2=d2825fe8-6e0a-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODI4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjgyNWZlOC02ZTBhLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nmM2icoPzJXEeTPxdSQnH6H5F20t-U62WVkIcPTpq7M=) | [CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11997803/122877949/10128690?refcode=20191118-EM-E1-DF-T0F1S1C1-IN3&amount=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,1000,2800&recurring=1&refcode2=d2825fe8-6e0a-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODI4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjgyNWZlOC02ZTBhLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nmM2icoPzJXEeTPxdSQnH6H5F20t-U62WVkIcPTpq7M=)

Asking you to donate doesn’t come easy to me.

But, I’m not running for Congress as a well-connected businessperson or establishment politician. _They can just call up their special interest friends for a favor and receive thousands of dollars to their campaigns!_

Peter, I’m a United States Air Force veteran.

I’m a former aircraft mechanic and systems engineer.

I was a working, single mom to my only daughter, Kathyrn.

[**And I’m running for Congress because Kevin McCarthy has disgracefully sidelined working families so that he can defend Trump on FOX News, smear good Democrats like Adam Schiff, and fight against impeachment with every bone in his body.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11997804/122877950/10128690?refcode=20191118-EM-E1-DF-T0F1S1C1-IN3&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,1000,2800&recurring=1&refcode2=d2825fe8-6e0a-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODI4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjgyNWZlOC02ZTBhLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nmM2icoPzJXEeTPxdSQnH6H5F20t-U62WVkIcPTpq7M=)

Democrats won tough races all over the country in 2018, Peter.

We CAN defeat Kevin McCarthy, SHOCK everyone, and send Trump a message he’ll NEVER see coming.

[**Please, can I count on your generosity today with a $5 (or more!) contribution? It’s incredibly important that we have the campaign funds to run a massive grassroots operation to defeat Trump’s yes-man. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11997805/122877951/10128690?refcode=20191118-EM-E1-DF-T0F1S1C1-IN3&amount=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,1000,2800&recurring=1&refcode2=d2825fe8-6e0a-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODI4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjgyNWZlOC02ZTBhLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nmM2icoPzJXEeTPxdSQnH6H5F20t-U62WVkIcPTpq7M=)

| | More than ten months ago, I entered this race to put People First. [Starting from scratch, with more than 400,000 contributions from more than 185,000 people, averaging just $20](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191118_em_fr_b1_castro_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+Starting+from+scratch+with+more+than+400&utm_campaign=20191118_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191118_em_fr_b1_castro_all") \- we've built a campaign with grassroots support across the country. **Billionaire Tom Steyer has already spent over $55 million on TV ads to get on the debate stage. Now, ten months in - Billionaire Michael Bloomberg is jumping in the race to use his personal fortune to try and buy the nomination.** We don't need another ego-driven billionaire flooding the airwaves. **We know your support isn 't for sale.** [Contribute now and show them we can't be bought.](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191118_em_fr_b1_castro_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2+-+Contribute+now+and+show+them+we+canrsquo&utm_campaign=20191118_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191118_em_fr_b1_castro_all") I didn't run to see myself on TV - I ran to work with you. **I 'm running because there's a housing crisis, because, in this country getting sick means going bankrupt for too many, and because while the wealthiest in this country are earning more than ever, wages for the rest of us have stagnated. ** An economy built to benefit billionaires doesn't need a billionaire reaching down to voters to convince them to help him. This campaign is about working together to lift each other up. No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc837/3eb3e2fc/577c654c/744d60c9/1967616536/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191118_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191118_em_fr_b1_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc837/3eb3e2fc/577c654c/744d60c8/1967616536/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=20191118_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191118_em_fr_b1_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc837/3eb3e2fc/577c654c/744d6337/1967616536/VEsHAQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=20191118_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191118_em_fr_b1_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know "". If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe "", and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: The League of Conservation Voters endorsed our campaign. Now will you add YOUR endorsement?
body:
We are proud to report...
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f33/4bef7a87/6bcfd99b/287ff594/2597500140/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends, we are proud to report:
The League of Conservation Voters endorsed our campaign!
They support candidates who will fight to protect our air, water, and earth from the far-reaching effects of pollution and climate change.
**We 're excited to receive their endorsement, but to be honest, it's just as important that we receive YOUR endorsement. **
[**Will you add your name to say you personally endorse Sara Gideon for U.S. Senate? We want to know if you are committed to our fight to defeat Susan Collins.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f33/4bef7a87/6bcfd99b/287ff56b/2597500140/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMTgtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/personal-endorsement-sara-gideon?source=em191118-2-full")
Thank you for signing your name and being a part of this team. I mean it when I say, we can't do this without you.
All my best,
Amy Mesner
Campaign Manager
******[ADD YOUR NAME](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f33/4bef7a87/6bcfd99b/287ff56b/2597500140/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMTgtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/personal-endorsement-sara-gideon?source=em191118-2-full")******

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f33/4bef7a87/6bcfd99b/287ff56a/2597500140/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f33/4bef7a87/6bcfd99b/287ff569/2597500140/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

The debates are an opportunity for Tom to stand in front of the country and talk about his plans for our future. They’re a way to help this team and this movement grow even bigger. But he can’t get there without your help. Please chip in just $1 today and help get Tom to the stage: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | Thanks for being with us, Tom 2020 Thanks for your support, friend. We're still looking for 1,197 more donors from Pennsylvania to make sure that Tom is on the December debate stage. Be a proud grassroots donor for Tom today. | [PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]() We want to make sure you're receiving relevant information about this movement. If you'd like to learn more about volunteering for Tom's campaign, . If you'd like to stay up to date with Tom on the road, make sure to follow him on , , and . If you'd rather not receive emails from us, you can unsubscribe by clicking = — we'll be sad to see you go! Tom Steyer 2020 · PO Box 626 · San Francisco, CA 94104 · USA

name: NewsAlert@MarkWarnerVA.com
subject: This is a big development
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
One of Mark's GOP opponents, former Congressman Scott Taylor, just unveiled a big slate of endorsements. With two former members of Congress and a number of General Assembly members now backing Taylor
|
---
| | Derek,

One of Mark's GOP opponents, former Congressman Scott Taylor, just unveiled a big slate of endorsements. With two former members of Congress and a number of General Assembly members now backing Taylor, his campaign is claiming "incredible momentum" to help "defeat Senator Mark Warner."

**This is a big development in the fight to keep Virginia blue in 2020, and we have to fight back. Will you rush a donation to help Mark's rapid response efforts?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[DONATE $5](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d7b9/53d9897e/53d1854a/1c89e257/1328826945/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fight?express_lane=true&refcode=20191118nd__342__&refcode2=express_lane_1&amount=5")** **[DONATE $10](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d7b9/53d9897e/53d1854a/1c89e256/1328826945/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA $25](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d7b9/53d9897e/53d1854a/1c89e255/1328826945/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fight?express_lane=true&refcode=20191118nd__342__&refcode2=express_lane_3&amount=25")** **[DONATE $50](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d7b9/53d9897e/53d1854a/1c89e254/1328826945/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fight?express_lane=true&refcode=20191118nd__342__&refcode2=express_lane_4&amount=50")** **[DONATE $100](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d7b9/53d9897e/53d1854a/1c89e253/1328826945/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fight?express_lane=true&refcode=20191118nd__342__&refcode2=express_lane_5&amount=100")** **[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d7b9/53d9897e/53d1854a/1c89e252/1328826945/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fight?refcode=20191118nd__342__&refcode2=express_lane_other")** Make no mistake: re-electing Mark and beating Donald Trump in Virginia is going to be a tough fight. Mark won his last re-election by less than 1%, and we're going to have to work even harder to win in 2020.

That's because the Trump campaign has been investing in a Virginia ground operation that will boost turnout for Mark's eventual opponent. If we're going to turn out Virginia Democrats in the numbers we'll need to build on our General Assembly victories, re-elect Mark, and beat Donald Trump, we'll need all hands on deck.

**That's why we're asking for your help. Between Scott Taylor's latest endorsements and the Trump campaign's turnout operation, it's clear we need to step up our efforts.[Will you donate today to help Mark fight back?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d7b9/53d9897e/53d1854a/1c89e251/1328826945/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fight?refcode=20191118nd__342__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

Thanks for all you do, Derek. This is going to be a tough campaign, and we know Mark really appreciates your strong support. Let's keep up the fight.

-- Team Warner | **[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d7b9/53d9897e/53d1854a/1c89e250/1328826945/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fight?refcode=20191118nd__342__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Pelosi: Trump has committed "profound betrayals of our Constitution"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Nancy Pelosi is right. Every bit of evidence we saw last week goes further and further to show how the president betrayed his oath of office and the document he swore to protect. Plain and simple. This week will reveal exactly how he did that, as the House hosts public hearings for numerous key witnesses, including Lt. Col. Alexander Vindman tomorrow, Ambassador to the E.U. Gordon ("What quid pro quo? Oh, _that_ quid pro quo") Sondland on Wednesday, and former National Security Council staffer Fiona Hill on Thursday. We've already had a series of shocking revelations this past week, as well as shocking behavior from the president \-- he directly attacked Ambassador Yovanovitch on Twitter as she was testifying (i.e. explicit witness intimidation). We need to know how last week's testimony is impacting public opinion before the next round begins, so we NEED to know where you stand: **Do you support impeaching Donald Trump?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc2d/6e9863e8/166158bb/1db092fe/1617642775/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/SX2uZQu9") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc2d/6e9863e8/166158bb/1db092fe/1617642775/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/SX2uZQu9") Thank you in advance for your feedback \-- we couldn't do this work without you, The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc2d/6e9863e8/166158bb/1db092fc/1617642775/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191118c.ND-b&refcode2=Kzks23H8NKelkBUJVpsT")
---
|
---

| | Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
---

PO Box 15320
Washington, DC 20003

[Unsubscribe](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc2d/6e9863e8/166158bb/1db092c1/1617642775/VEsC/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/unsubscribe")

name: Team Weld
subject: Campaign Highlights & Happenings — November 18th, 2019
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee
body:
|
---
| [](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23HvggvoZ_zOOINCNDzJ03kY9fRhi-ZgWDwlpLRkGMKu0r2brQaErcEYU9gHsflLNg&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191118_newsletter&n=1)
# Campaign Highlights & Happenings
[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23HvggvoZ_zOOINCNDzJ03kY9fRhi-ZgWDwlpLRkGMKu0r2brQaErcEYU9gHsflLNg&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191118_newsletter&n=2)
### Ballot Access: We are officially on the ballot for two states and counting!
On November 13th, Governor Weld, his wife Leslie, and a group of supporters filed his Declaration of Candidacy with the New Hampshire Secretary of State. This means Governor Weld is now on four ballots – Alabama, Arkansas, Michigan, and New Hampshire! We are working diligently to get on the remaining ballots in the coming weeks and months. | | [SUPPORT BILL →](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23HvggvoZ_zOOINCNDzJ03kY9fRhi-ZgWDwlpLRkGMKu0r2brQaErcEYU9gHsflLNg&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191118_newsletter&n=3)
---
## In the News: A Few of This Week's Stories
### MSNBC: _Bill Weld on Impeachment: Trump "ten times where Mr. Nixon was"_
"William Weld, 2020 Republican candidate and former Massachusetts governor, joins Alex Witt to discuss the impeachment inquiry. Plus, his thoughts on a recent speech by AG Bill Barr and Louisiana’s gubernatorial election."

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=uMdfrsu_sbvlXpaGhkswPVF8KhEsN3qhgUmBpRj89HRGCsrs566yGPpzfd-DsxsheDIUgPIkF7vdOqEkR7yJ3kZ0SxxcIcrn67B5yU44JWdED0OzgP0PR54BCB2AMJNUx7q62jsLmpx5viNxzmdFVXIV4Tq1cVa4qbei3lNQjWU&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191118_newsletter&n=4)
### CNN Politics: _Bill Weld files for New Hampshire primary_
"Former Massachusetts Gov. Bill Weld on Wednesday said he filed for the New Hampshire Republican primary and is now on the ballot in the first-in-the-nation primary state."

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=9j2xrPCwd3yFLU_EZoBgHueVv_f-dLq7AgHwnUSDcFv4Wlthy2hDgQP4hmPaqOgO52Ztiv1zb_YeX2_islbT49AKdt___rAqjZuMi4jebgC8Y0oqSDrVRmCD-TjS19lG&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191118_newsletter&n=5)
### NECN: _Bill Weld saw Watergate up close. Trump is "more of a huckster," he says_
"If presidential history seems to be repeating itself in the shape of Congress' impeachment inquiry, White House hopeful Bill Weld has kept his front-row seat."

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=3OFytnzPrhZr3zhSHvIVuMbFAWs2OAFA6GjoYJopukRB6Yk3wrVQVxaoifqSYixfxfDLCXnvqnWu6Ah5JQk-XiKFe4_v8e78Fmm-ocWW0BTfCC9svWI1gwQ3Mhdvu8YKNB3fjt01K2JAwhJUh1Px2g&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191118_newsletter&n=6)
### TuftsNow: _Tell me more: A Republican voice of dissent_
"There needs to be a conservative alternative to Trump, says presidential candidate and former Massachusetts governor Bill Weld in a Tufts podcast"

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=tCx1Q_5FJeWFuD8xuVEudrJWI_-f1RPW66GtZPf5-bqhvyE1YxyGkBYGwYz8M6diwfRzbGxwYVkcSzm5kNmS2WiIHAXzNsY1iObXRsgkTwI&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191118_newsletter&n=7)
### The Times of Northwest Indiana: _Guest Commentary: Republican Bill Weld's advice to Dems on impeachment - less is more_
"When it comes to impeachment, less is more. That’s the advice former Massachusetts governor — and Nixon impeachment veteran — Bill Weld had for the Democrats in Washington, as he filed paperwork to challenge President Trump on the GOP presidential ballot in New Hampshire."

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=LNS7YaaIGo8qqx3WC-g1sFLdwIxuf9Lv6gEK5LtxI4KbZhIzkrOqzwr-oKwLArlFTpzAWRia5sGArqbfj-hDq34Ehl2JUfZoRPA_rECrfQss0Jj3ppwtpVB1KqNCcEg3rFXGcWrqH0MzmBNh78ziVhRCQz8cBQm4rdSuz-HYrnPkOzvkaj8lc8ycEGx8PyuKLFvDFVRWn_xOVtB9TSuLGIeS_TXBUm88onQyAoEeMtE&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191118_newsletter&n=8)
### NECN: _Weld talks about his primary battle against Trump._
Watch the clip at the link below!

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRbCFfxpX3apUxQOInZSoh1a&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191118_newsletter&n=9)
|
### Northeastern University Open Classroom: Foreign Policy Flashpoints
Wednesday, November 20th Northeastern University West Village F, Room 20 Boston, MA 6:00-8:00PM ET Open to the public [Details here](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nmUUukZrx1xgsPFq6NPPOW0FwcCMY3zZFUR3G5rrqXNFxGOkcNPjUZTxqzroVi1Uqj-iYv2qh3CIRRXHPYyPR8&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191118_newsletter&n=10) [Live Stream Here](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6naXpVI5VK7S1CwbssMXtf_QkVih9S9P2-y_ejy1rR22afgkRvr52M3OQWDqaNhGjQ&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191118_newsletter&n=11) |
### The Chamber Collaborative of Greater Portsmouth: Presidential Candidate Breakfast
Friday, November 22nd Sheraton Portsmouth Harborside Hotel 250 Market Street Portsmouth, NH 7:30-9:30AM ET [Registration is required](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7cAZKD0M03Nlt-L72FFPZ4wtGvFE0XJD6nFJ8bJ-UZHPLDw2Q9GQLY6ZysTg-IIoWyy6ZTeVjzXI_l8sYBcFWzHGCM3ZHPuOi72q_w1Y4_8&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191118_newsletter&n=12) Cost: $25
---|---
### A Night Out with Presidential Candidate Bill Weld
Friday, November 22nd Portsmouth Gas Light Co. 64 Market Street Portsmouth, NH 6:30-8:00PM ET [Register Here](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=uuUyPGiVHWR_V3cUbcvCWfbzrQQvaU_O59ZgVWWZNJpyzqSv47RvXohzsia-YnEQ6dry1bs5PH_6kHVk6rVzF2J8Ni1Ao78eD3288yUT1frosE6Tfb-3pycojDpKE5RZumIHCaDx1EUy4c6_cWr1wWktIiHeacgBr7Yp0xlRDlx6gRWx50SYGEd1MQ4p8WoGcxmy0kpfYEbp_ThVjvD2ZxoflP40S6KmTKwOaTaha9c&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191118_newsletter&n=13) |
### Concord NH Christmas Parade
Saturday, November 23rd Loudon Road Concord, NH 9:30-11:30AM ET [Register Here](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6niRtSp9ay0WXZOk1g9DkDteqOtEF72EIGLyVCybL80r7Vfp7YgOF_4VGB08ecHzQMO5fkYsvFl3vqYGM6HPiwf8sezYE1tyZKCRp3TZSx5sZIGwNaXN2YC1yLeV-rJq0g&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191118_newsletter&n=14)
| [weld2020.org](weld2020.org) | [ Gov Bill Weld ](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sD5mbawGI5P2loKSMnHaUPJQdagn1SdGMQUy6UvfZqO&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191118_newsletter&n=15) | [ @govbillweld ](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Tqwz1e-RkyfKg8oS4PThRIU&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191118_newsletter&n=16)

subject: Statement from Angela Underwood Jacobs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Angela Underwood Jacobs for Congress
body:
Now more than ever Republicans need unity — that is why I am stepping aside and supporting Steve Knight to take back the 25th. | | | [ ](https://angelaforyou.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d7d4b85919c13e69612d61456&id=bded622c2a&e=ec66c3b29a)
---
| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
November 18, 2019
---
**Contact:[Stephen Puetz](mailto:spuetz@axiomstrategies.com )**
(760) 716-9250‬
---
|
## Statement from Angela Underwood Jacobs

"I decided to run for Congress when it became clear that Steve Knight would not seek a rematch against Katie Hill. I strongly believed that as a mother, businesswoman and community leader I would be the best candidate to defeat Hill and play a role in making our country stronger, safer and more prosperous.

I launched this campaign for the right reasons and had every intention of seeing it through to a victorious Election Day. I have met thousands of amazing people, had hundreds donate and have been blessed with dozens of active volunteers. With the resignation of Hill, this race has become a new type of campaign — a campaign that Congressman Knight has decided to re-enter.

While it pains me to step aside and suspend my campaign, I know it is the right thing for me to do at this time. Now more than ever Republicans need unity and I believe the right thing to do to get behind the candidate who has the best chance of building the resources to win the primary and ultimately defeat a liberal democrat next November. That is why I am stepping aside and supporting Steve Knight to take back the 25th. I strongly encourage my fellow Republican candidates, supporters and donors to join me as well."
###

In just a couple of days, Elizabeth will be joining the debate stage in Atlanta.

This next debate is a chance for millions of Americans to hear about Elizabeth's vision for big, structural change. This fight is their fight, too -- and Elizabeth will be making the case for our grassroots movement.

**After this debate, people from across the country will be wondering how they can get involved. We need to be ready to fight -- and have the resources to empower Americans to join our movement and make change in their communities.**

**[You're an important part of this campaign, and we can't thank you enough. As we ramp up organizing ahead of 2020, will you make a donation for the first time today to continue to help keep up the momentum?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528ac0/45c30650/11a2b589e/66f49e19/1840096974/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW5vdjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTDgxRl9ERUJfQlNDX1RfMjAxOTExMThfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-nov19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EML81F_DEB_BSC_T_20191118_V1S2_P")**

>
During each debate, Elizabeth gets the chance to speak directly to voters all across the country.

But we all know that this debate isn't just about one night of TV -- because creating big, structural change starts from the bottom up.

What's important is what comes after the debate -- the work and resources it takes to translate the momentum of the night into more organizers and volunteers on the ground, more one-on-one conversations with people in their communities, and more public town halls where we can grow our movement across the country.

**[If you chip in today, you can help make all of that happen. This fight is their fight, too -- and Elizabeth will be making the case for our... | | | "" In just a couple of days, Elizabeth will be joining the debate stage in Atlanta. This next debate is a chance for millions of Americans to hear about Elizabeth's vision for big, structural change. This fight is their fight, too -- and Elizabeth will be making the case for our grassroots movement. After this debate, people from across the country will be wondering how they can get involved. We need to be ready to fight -- and have the resources to empower Americans to join our movement and make change in their communities.
